takeaways.title_zh: 投放前先做关键词研究: keywords 必须拆到 ad group 维度
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 强调跑 Google Ads 前必须先完成 keyword research, 而且要把关键词拆到不同 campaign 和 ad group 里。原理: 一个 ad group 只放一个 keyword theme, 这样后续优化、预算分配、报表都能基于明确维度做决策, 而不是混在一起一团乱。Amazon 启示: SP keyword campaign 同样要按 keyword theme 分组而不是把 broad/phrase/exact 混在一个 campaign。
takeaways.quote_en: before you even dive in and set up and start your google ads campaign you need to do your keyword research first and so much so that you need to have all of your keywords broken into different campaigns and ad groups
takeaways.tldr: keywords 必须拆到 campaign 和 ad group 两层,一个 ad group 一个 keyword theme
bullets: 一个 ad group 只放一个 keyword theme
拆分后才能按维度做优化、预算、报表决策
禁止多个 theme 混在一个 ad group
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP keyword campaign 按 theme 分组,不要把 broad/phrase/exact 混一起

takeaways.title_zh: 关键词研究先用 Google Doc 手写真实搜索词, 再进 Keyword Planner
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 不直接打开 Keyword Planner, 而是先在 Google Doc 里手写自己作为消费者会搜的词 (e.g. pest control + 地区修饰词), 把这批种子词复制粘贴进 Keyword Planner discover new keywords 里。原理: 真实消费者搜索习惯比第三方算法更接近实际意图, 起手用真人语料能避免被工具误导扩到无关词。Amazon 启示: 做 SP keyword 调研时, listing copy 不该是唯一种子, 自己以买家身份搜一遍补全 long-tail。
takeaways.quote_en: the way that I actually start this process and the way that I've always found I've had the most success in google ads campaigns is when I've actually completed before I've even gone into google ads and used the google search keyword tool
takeaways.tldr: 先 Google Doc 手写真实消费者搜索词,再粘进 Keyword Planner,避免工具误导
bullets: 禁止直接开 Keyword Planner,先手写种子词(如 pest control + 地区)
真人语料 > 算法推荐,避免扩到无关词
种子词来源:自己作为消费者会搜什么
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 种子词不能只靠 listing copy,自己以买家身份搜补全 long-tail

takeaways.title_zh: 选词只看 trend 不看绝对值, 高竞争 + 高 CPC 直接砍
takeaways.summary_zh: Keyword Planner 给的 monthly search / competition / top of page bid 都只反映过去趋势, 不是未来确定值。Aaron 决策方法: 高 search volume + low/medium competition + 可承受 CPC 的留下; 像 pest control 这种泛词竞争和单价都极高就主动放弃, 用 pest control + 地区 这种 mid-tail 词更划算。Amazon 启示: SP keyword 选词同理, head term 像 'water bottle' 卷不过大牌, 加品类/材质修饰的 long-tail ACoS 更友好。
takeaways.quote_en: we look here some of these more targeted keywords like pest control sunshine coast and brisbane we've got some really good search volumes but the the the clicks are a little bit more a little bit cheaper as well
takeaways.tldr: 高竞争 + 高 CPC 双条件同时命中的泛词直接砍,mid-tail 更划算
bullets: 留下条件:高 volume + 低/中 competition + 可承受 CPC
砍掉条件:泛词竞争+单价双高(如 pest control)
替换:泛词 + 地区/品类修饰的 mid-tail 词
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 避开 head term(如 water bottle),用材质/品类 long-tail 降 ACoS

takeaways.title_zh: One Keyword Theme 拆分: 同一类目按地区/属性独立 campaign
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 把 keyword 导出成 csv 后, 加两列 (campaign / ad group), 把 'pest control brisbane' 和 'pest control gold coast' 拆到独立 campaign。原理: 不同地区可独立设预算; 报表能立刻看出哪个区域好哪个区域差; 写 ad copy 时 headline 可直接写 'pest control brisbane' 而不是泛词, 提高 CTR。Amazon 启示: 不同 ASIN/品类/受众应拆 campaign 而不是塞一个 campaign 多 ad group, 才能独立调预算和单价。
takeaways.quote_en: by breaking it down and only having one keyword theme one single keyword theme in each of your ad groups it means that when you come to actually write your ad copy you you can become really really specific and really really targeted
takeaways.tldr: 同类关键词按地区/属性拆独立 campaign,预算/报表/文案三层解耦
bullets: 一个 campaign 只覆盖一个地区/属性主题(如 pest control Brisbane 独立)
好处:独立调预算 + 报表直观对比区域 + headline 写精准词(非泛词)提升 CTR
Amazon 同理:不同 ASIN/品类/受众拆 campaign,不要塞一个 campaign 多 ad group
takeaways.amazon_tip: 不同 ASIN/品类/受众拆 campaign,不要塞一个 campaign 多 ad group

takeaways.title_zh: Keyword Theme 越细越好, 一个 ad group 只放一个主题
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 反复强调 one keyword theme method: 单个 ad group 内只放一个关键词主题。好处四点: ad copy 可写得更精准提升 quality score; 能看清哪个 theme 出转化; 表现差的 theme 一键暂停而不会牵连其他词; 报表清晰。原理: ad group 是 Google Ads 的最小优化单元, 只有保持单一性才能做出基于数据的决策。Amazon 启示: SP keyword campaign 不要把 head + long-tail 混在一个 ad group, 拆开能精确停掉烧钱的词。
takeaways.quote_en: for this method we only put one keyword theme into each ad group and this is very important for a number of reasons including that it makes it easier to write keyword focused ad copy for high quality keyword scores it allows you to very easily see which keyword themes are more successful in generating conversions
takeaways.tldr: 单 ad group = 单 keyword theme,拆分才能精准优化和一键止损
bullets: ad copy 更精准 → quality score 提升
数据清晰:哪个 theme 出转化一目了然
止损快:差 theme 一键暂停,不牵连其他词
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 拆开 head + long-tail,分 ad group 才能精确停烧钱词

takeaways.title_zh: Keyword Theme 拆得细 → ad copy 和 landing page 才能强相关
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 用 Bali villa 案例: 把关键词拆成 'one bedroom villas bali / one bedroom villas seminyak / 2 bedroom villas / general bali' 等子主题, 每个 ad group 配独立 ad copy 和 landing page。原理: 搜 seminyak 的人看到 seminyak 文案 + 直接落到 seminyak 房型页, 转化路径最短; 用 generic 文案 CTR 和转化率都会掉。Amazon 启示: SD/SB 不能用一套创意打所有 ASIN, 不同卖点匹配不同搜索意图才能压低 ACoS。
takeaways.quote_en: the benefit of this structure is that it means you can target your individual keyword themes with specific ad copy and also specific landing pages on your website
takeaways.tldr: keyword theme 拆细 → ad copy 和 landing page 都定制 → 转化路径最短
bullets: 拆法:按地区/房型/床数拆成独立 ad group(如 seminyak 1bed vs generic bali)
每个 ad group 配专属文案 + 专属落地页,搜词-文案-页面三者完全匹配
用通用文案会导致 CTR 和转化率双降
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD/SB 不能一套创意打所有 ASIN,不同卖点匹配不同搜索意图才能压低 ACoS

takeaways.title_zh: Keyword Planner 数据只看 trend, 别死磕精确值
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 提醒做 keyword research 时数据是动态的: 你研究完竞品大牌一进场, 所有 CPC/竞争度估算瞬间变。所以只看 trend 不看绝对数: 哪些词流量大、竞争重、CPC 走势如何。原理: 实时拍卖市场没有静态答案, 选词逻辑应基于相对优劣而不是某个具体 CPC 数字。Amazon 启示: SP 调研某词 'suggested bid 1.5 USD' 不可作为长期决策依据, 上线后要持续根据实际 ACoS 微调。
takeaways.quote_en: don't get caught up on exact figures as you need to remember that all of the data that you're seeing is just reporting on past data trends and that this data can actually change by the time you press go on your campaign
takeaways.tldr: Keyword Planner 数据反映过去 trend,实时拍卖无静态答案,只看相对优劣别信绝对值
bullets: 看 trend 不看绝对值:流量大小、竞争度、CPC 走势
竞品/大牌进场瞬间改变所有估算,静态 CPC 数字不可靠
选词基于相对优劣,上线后持续根据实际表现微调
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP suggested bid 不作长期依据,上线后按实际 ACoS 持续微调

takeaways.title_zh: 选词三筛标准: 相关性 + 竞争度 + CPC 三关一起看
takeaways.summary_zh: 在 Keyword Planner 里选词时 Aaron 三步过滤: (1) 相关性 e.g. 'free business cards' 对收费业务无意义直接砍; (2) 竞争度 high 单看不够; (3) competition high + top-of-page bid 双高的词砍掉, 否则烧不起。原理: 单一指标会误导, 三关同时通过的才进 plan。Amazon 启示: SP 选词同样要 ASIN 相关性 + suggested bid + impression share 三看, 高竞争词不一定要全部铺开。
takeaways.quote_en: we are looking at is not only is this competition too high but if the competition is high and then also the top of page bid is too high we can leave that out of our campaign
takeaways.tldr: 选词三关同时通过:相关性合格 + 竞争度可控 + CPC 可承受,单一指标会误导
bullets: 第一关:相关性(如 'free business cards' 对收费业务直接砍)
第二/三关联判:competition high + top-of-page bid 双高同时命中才砍
禁止只看单指标(如只看 competition high 就放弃)
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 选词同样三看:ASIN 相关性 + suggested bid + impression share,高竞争词不必全铺

takeaways.title_zh: 导出 csv 后再次细拆主题: 一组拆成 4-5 个 ad group
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 把 Keyword Planner 选好的 'signage' 一类导出 csv 后, 再用人工眼力拆成 'business signage / custom signs / outdoor signage / sign company near me' 等 4 个 ad group。原 'signage near me' 太宽直接删掉。原理: 工具导出的初步分组依然不够细, 必须人工二次拆分到极简主题, 每个 ad group 才能配高度匹配的 ad copy。Amazon 启示: SP 自动跑出来的 search term 报表也要人工二次拆主题再迁回 manual 精准词。
takeaways.quote_en: now I'm actually now deciding that this keyword is actually too broad so I'm going to remove that keyword and just work on these four main keyword themes of business signage custom signs outdoor signage and sign company near me
takeaways.tldr: Planner 初步分组导出后,人工二次拆成 4-5 个极简主题 ad group
bullets: 拆分粒度:signage 拆成 business/custom/outdoor/near me 4 个独立 ad group
删除条件:'signage near me' 太宽直接砍
目的:每个 ad group 极简主题才能配高度匹配 ad copy
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 自动跑出的 search term 报表人工二次拆主题,再迁回 manual 精准词

takeaways.title_zh: Match Type 已不再需要分 ad group, 只放一种类型即可
takeaways.summary_zh: Google 2021 调整: broader match 现在自动包含 narrower match (broad 含 phrase 含 exact)。所以以前流行的 '同一关键词三种 match type 各开一个 ad group' 做法已经过时, 现在每个词只放一种 match type 就行。原理: Google 的撮合逻辑变了, 重复布词只会浪费预算和分散数据。Amazon 启示: SP 也存在 match type, 同一关键词的 broad / phrase / exact 不要堆在同一个 ad group, 选清楚目标后只用一种。
takeaways.quote_en: broader match types capture all queries of narrower match types so what this actually means is if you're targeting a phrase match keyword google will now automatically also match any exact match keywords
takeaways.tldr: broader match 自动含 narrower match,同词只放一种 match type,不再分三个 ad group
bullets: 2021 后 broad 含 phrase 含 exact,重复布词浪费预算
废弃做法:同词开 3 个 ad group(broad/phrase/exact 各一个)
新做法:每个词只选一种 match type
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 同词不堆 broad/phrase/exact,选清目标只用一种

takeaways.title_zh: Exact Match 已变 'same meaning', 必须每周做 search term audit
takeaways.summary_zh: Google 把 exact match 升级成语义匹配: 'lawn mowing service' 会触发 'grass cutting service'; 案例里 'all blacks headphones' 居然触发 'all blacks rugby jacket'。所以现在每 7 天必须查 search term 报告, 把无关词加成 negative keyword。原理: 语义匹配会引入 Google 自以为相关但实际无关的流量, 不主动屏蔽就持续烧预算。Amazon 启示: SP 同样要每周拉 search term 报表把无关 customer search 加进 negative keyword/ASIN, 这是 Amazon 投放最高 ROI 的优化动作之一。
takeaways.quote_en: if you've got a highly specific product and a highly specific target market where you want to only be targeting search terms such as all blacks headphones what you need to do is you actually need to go through and do a search term audit every seven days
takeaways.tldr: Exact match 已变语义匹配,每 7 天必须 audit search term + 加 negative
bullets: 现状:'lawn mowing' 会触发 'grass cutting','headphones' 触发 'jacket'
红线:不做 weekly audit 就持续烧无关流量预算
Amazon 同理:SP 每周拉 search term 加 negative keyword/ASIN,最高 ROI 优化动作
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 每周拉 search term 加 negative keyword/ASIN,最高 ROI 优化动作

takeaways.title_zh: Headlines 蓝色更醒目, ad copy 重点全压在 headline
takeaways.summary_zh: Google 搜索结果里 headline 是蓝色加粗, description 是普通灰色文字。用户扫页面 headline 不抓眼球, description 根本不会被读, 更别提点击。所以写 ad copy 80% 精力放 headline (3 条 ×30 字符), description 配合即可。原理: 用户决策链路只有 1 秒不到, 视觉权重不平等。Amazon 启示: SB headline 也是同理, listing title 前 80 字符决定 CTR, 后面写得再细也没人看。
takeaways.quote_en: your headlines are bold and blue so they stand out more than the descriptions so if your headlines do not grab their attention they won't even read your descriptions let alone click on your ad
takeaways.tldr: headline 蓝色加粗,用户 <1 秒决策,80% 精力放 headline
bullets: headline 视觉权重 >> description(蓝加粗 vs 灰普通)
headline 不抓眼球 → description 不被读 → 零点击
资源分配:3 条 headline ×30 字符吃透,description 配合即可
takeaways.amazon_tip: SB headline / listing title 前 80 字符决定 CTR,后段再细也白写

takeaways.title_zh: Headline 必须含 4 要素: keyword + brand + CTA + emotion
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 经过多次 split test 沉淀的 headline 公式: (1) keyword focus (e.g. 'one bedroom seminyak villa'); (2) brand mention (花了广告费别浪费曝光机会); (3) strong CTA (call now / book now / save 45%); (4) emotional trigger (curiosity / humor / fear)。原理: keyword 是 Google quality score 喜欢的, 后三项是 user 喜欢的, 两边都满足才能做出高 CTR + 高 CVR 的 ad。Amazon 启示: SB/SD 创意文案也是这个逻辑, 单纯堆 keyword 太机械, 加品牌名 + 促销 hook 才会被点。
takeaways.quote_en: the four things you need in your headlines is firstly you need to have keyword focus... the second thing is a brand mention... the other one is a strong call to action... and the last one is use emotional triggers
takeaways.tldr: Headline 4 要素:keyword + brand + CTA + emotion,同时满足 Google 和用户
bullets: keyword focus 拉 quality score,后三项拉 CTR/CVR
brand mention 必须写,已花广告费别浪费曝光
CTA 具体化(call now/book now/save 45% 而非泛泛要求)
emotional trigger 选一种(curiosity/humor/fear)
takeaways.amazon_tip: SB/SD 文案别只堆词,品牌名+促销 hook 才会被点

takeaways.title_zh: Title Case 大写每个单词首字母, 提升 CTR 实测有效
takeaways.summary_zh: ad copy 把每个单词首字母大写 (e.g. 'Book Your Appointment Now') 而不是 sentence case ('Book your appointment now')。WordStream 和 Periscopic 实测 title case 比 sentence case CTR 更高, 不违反 AdWords 政策。原理: 视觉上更突出, 在一堆小写竞品广告里更醒目。Amazon 启示: SB headline / brand store 标题用 title case 是免费的 CTR 优化, 几乎零成本可执行。
takeaways.quote_en: two companies wordstream and periscopic have conducted studies into the effects of using title case on the click-through ratio ctr and found that ad copy with title case outperform sentence case
takeaways.tldr: Title Case (每词首字母大写) 比 sentence case CTR 更高,WordStream/Periscopic 实测有效
bullets: 执行:'Book Your Appointment Now' 而非 'Book your appointment now'
原理:视觉突出,在小写竞品广告中更醒目
合规:不违反 AdWords 政策
takeaways.amazon_tip: SB headline/brand store 标题用 Title Case,零成本提升 CTR

takeaways.title_zh: Emotion + 反常 hook 比 discount 更出圈, skinny dip 案例
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 的 Bali 别墅广告用 'skinny dip in your own pool' 当 headline, 因为别墅有 3 米高围墙带私人泳池。结果有客人专门来邮件确认 '我真的能裸泳吗？', 转化效果远超普通 discount 广告。原理: 行业里都在喊降价, 你用反差感 hook 创造心理画面 (curiosity), 让用户主动想象使用场景。Amazon 启示: 创意视频/A+ 不要全部都是 USP 罗列, 选一个反常使用场景 (e.g. 凉鞋穿去爬山) 反而记忆点更深。
takeaways.quote_en: this has been the absolute knockout home run for us is that in our ad copy we were able to create some curiosity and humor by saying that you can skinny dip in your own pool
takeaways.tldr: 反常 hook('skinny dip')创造好奇心理画面,转化远超 discount 广告
bullets: 选一个反差使用场景当 headline(如别墅私泳池裸泳)
行业都喊降价时,反常 hook 让用户主动想象场景
效果验证:客人专门来邮件确认使用细节即成交信号
takeaways.amazon_tip: A+ 不全罗列 USP,用反常场景(凉鞋爬山)做记忆点

takeaways.title_zh: ad copy 双重达标: Google 喜欢 + User 喜欢
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 把 ad copy 评判拆成两个维度: Google likes (keyword focus 进 quality score, 影响排位) + User likes (CTA + emotional trigger, 影响 CTR)。两个都过关才有高 ROAS。常见失败案例是 ad copy 太机械, 只堆 keyword 通过审核, 但用户根本不点。原理: 算法和人是两个客户, 都得伺候好。Amazon 启示: SP/SB 创意要既包含买家搜索词 (relevance score), 又有点击欲望钩子 (折扣 / 痛点)。
takeaways.quote_en: you don't only need to focus on what google likes because you also need to focus on what the user likes... most ads fail down is that they're too robotic and there's no point getting an ad that gets shown all the time if people actually don't click on it
takeaways.tldr: ad copy 双维度评判:Google likes(keyword 进 quality score)+ User likes(CTA/情绪钩子进 CTR),两者都过关才有高 ROAS
bullets: Google 维度:keyword focus 提升 quality score 影响排位
User 维度:CTA + emotional trigger 驱动 CTR
失败红线:只堆 keyword 通过审核但用户不点,展示无意义
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP/SB 创意既含搜索词(relevance score)又放点击钩子(折扣/痛点)

takeaways.title_zh: 用 'Guaranteed Best Price' 化解第三方比价的恐惧情绪
takeaways.summary_zh: 酒店行业用户被 Booking.com 等比价站训练成永远在比价, Aaron 在自己的直营广告 headline 加 'Guaranteed Best Price' 直接消解这种 fear。原理: 用户犹豫的根因往往是怕买贵 / 怕买错, 写一句保证语句直接砸掉这个犹豫点, 转化率明显提升。Amazon 启示: listing 卡片 / SB 创意可以用 'Lowest Price On Amazon' / '30-Day Money Back' 这类反 fear 文案, 比单纯说卖点更打动人。
takeaways.quote_en: we were able to actually pull on that fear emotion with this last headline of guaranteed best price and what this actually did is it actually removed the fear with a guarantee
takeaways.tldr: headline 加 'Guaranteed Best Price' 直接砸掉「怕买贵」这个犹豫点,转化率提升
bullets: 用户犹豫根因:怕买贵/买错,不是不懂卖点
红线:比价行业(酒店/机票/电子)必出保证语句
文案公式:用一句保证(价格/退货)替代堆砌卖点
takeaways.amazon_tip: listing/SB 创意用 'Lowest Price' / '30-Day Money Back' 比堆功能更转化

takeaways.title_zh: RSA pinning: 把验证过的 headline 钉在固定位置
takeaways.summary_zh: RSA 默认让 Google AI 随机组合 15 个 headline 和 4 个 description, 但单 ad group 没 5000 月曝光时 AI 永远学不完。Aaron 的解法: 用 pin 功能把已验证的高转化 headline 钉到 position 1/2/3, 让 RSA 表现得像 ETA。原理: 在数据不够喂 AI 时, 人工经验 > AI 探索。Amazon 启示: SD/SB 没有 pin 但有创意权重控制, 高 ROAS 的素材应该手动加预算固定跑, 不要全交给系统优化。
takeaways.quote_en: even though you have the ability of adding up to 15 different headlines and up to four different descriptions you can still create an ad where you're only adding three headlines and then google also gives you the option to pin those headlines in either position one two or three
takeaways.tldr: 单 ad group < 5000 月曝光时,pin 高转化 headline 到位置 1/2/3,人工经验 > AI 探索
bullets: 数据不足场景:手动 pin 已验证 headline,让 RSA 退化成 ETA
红线:≥ 5000 月曝光才放开让 AI 自由组合
取舍:宁可只用 3 headline + pin 位置,不要 15 个全丢给 AI 盲测
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD/SB 高 ROAS 素材手动加预算固定跑,别全交系统优化

takeaways.title_zh: RSA split test 双 ad 法: 一个全开 + 一个 pin 固定
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 推荐 RSA split test 路径: 在同 ad group 里建两个 RSA, 一个完全不 pin (让 Google 自由组合), 另一个 pin 死特定 headline/description。对比两者的 CTR/CVR, 找出真正赢家后, 把 winner 元素回填到第一个 ad。原理: 同时利用 AI 探索 + 人工固化, 数据闭环可控。Amazon 启示: SP 创意 split test 也是这逻辑, 同 ad group 跑 2-3 个素材竞争, 表现最好的留下并扩增预算。
takeaways.quote_en: the second option to complete split testing with the response of search ads would be to have one responsive search ad which has no pinned headlines and no pin descriptions and then you would have a secondary response to search ad which would have some pinned headlines and pin descriptions
takeaways.tldr: 同 ad group 放 2 个 RSA:一个不 pin + 一个 pin 固定,对比 CTR/CVR 后回填 winner 元素
bullets: ad1:完全不 pin,让 Google 自由组合探索
ad2:pin 死特定 headline/description 作对照组
对比 CTR/CVR 找 winner,把胜出元素回填 ad1 形成闭环
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 同 ad group 跑 2-3 素材竞争,留最佳表现并扩增预算

takeaways.title_zh: Google AI 学习需 5000 月曝光, 中小账号根本喂不饱
takeaways.summary_zh: RSA learning phase 需要 5000 impressions / 30 天才能给出 performance 评级。中小广告主单 ad group 远达不到, 所以 RSA 永远卡在学习状态, AI 给不出靠谱组合, CPC/CPA 失控。Aaron 实测案例: 某 RSA cost-per-conversion 181 USD vs ETA 50 USD。原理: AI 缺数据 = 瞎决策。Amazon 启示: SP 自动定向同样需要数据冷启动, 中小预算账号别全押 auto, 应该 manual 锁定已验证的关键词。
takeaways.quote_en: in order for google to finish its learning phase so that it's ai can actually know which headlines and descriptions to show it actually needs 5,000 impressions in a 30-day period the problem for most small and medium businesses is that individual ad groups get nowhere near 5000 impressions
takeaways.tldr: RSA 需 5000 曝光/30 天完成学习,中小账号达不到就卡学习态永远失控
bullets: 5000 impressions/30 天是 RSA 给出 performance 评级的硬门槛
中小账号单 ad group 达不到 → AI 瞎组合 → CPC/CPA 失控(实测 181 USD vs ETA 50 USD)
预算不足别押 RSA,用 ETA 或提高单 ad group 预算集中喂数据
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP auto 同理需冷启动数据,中小预算别全押 auto,manual 锁定已验证词

takeaways.title_zh: Pin 操作把 RSA cost/conversion 从 181 砍到 39
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 案例: 一个 RSA 原本 cost/conv 181 USD, 他用之前 ETA 时代沉淀的 winner CTA ('from just 39/month' + 'month-to-month contracts') 通过 pin 钉死位置, 结果 cost/conv 降到 39 USD。原理: 把历史验证过的高转化文案锁住位置, 等于把 ETA 的稳定性叠加到 RSA 的形式上, 拿两边好处。Amazon 启示: 不要因为新形式就丢掉旧 winner 文案, 历史 ROAS 高的卖点该用还得用。
takeaways.quote_en: we made a really simple change and we started actually pinning in some of our headlines and also some of our descriptions... since we've made those changes we've been able to see the cost per conversion for this responsive search ad reduced from 181 dollars all the way down to 39
takeaways.tldr: 用 pin 钉死历史 winner CTA('from just 39/month'),RSA cost/conv 从 181 USD 降到 39 USD
bullets: ETA 时代验证过的高转化文案(如 'month-to-month contracts')通过 pin 锁死位置
叠加 ETA 稳定性 + RSA 形式,拿两边好处
新广告形式不等于丢弃旧 winner 文案
takeaways.amazon_tip: 历史 ROAS 高的卖点继续用在新广告类型里,别因形式变化推翻验证过的内容

takeaways.title_zh: Google 目标: 把单一 search query 匹配到唯一 landing page
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 解释 Google 的核心目标: 在 500 亿网页里把用户搜索匹配到最佳页面。所以你的账号结构应该镜像这个目标: account → campaign → ad group (单 keyword theme) → 独立 ad copy + 独立 landing page。原理: 你的结构越贴合 Google 的撮合逻辑, quality score 越高, CPC 越低。Amazon 启示: SP 的 ad group 也要按 ASIN 关联词分组, 让搜索 → 创意 → 落地 ASIN 形成 1:1 映射。
takeaways.quote_en: google wants to match what the person searches with the best web page on the internet... so to give your google ads campaign the best chance for success making sure that your ads are matching those individual search enquiries your campaign structure needs to look like this
takeaways.tldr: 账号结构必须镜像 Google 撮合逻辑:单 keyword theme → 独立 ad copy → 独立 landing page,形成 1:1 映射
bullets: ad group 只围绕单一 keyword theme,不混杂多主题
每个 ad group 配独立 ad copy + 独立落地页
结构越贴合撮合逻辑,quality score 越高、CPC 越低
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP ad group 按 ASIN 关联词分组,搜索词 → 创意 → ASIN 形成 1:1 映射

takeaways.title_zh: Optimization 必须有 schedule, 不同动作不同频率
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 把 Google Ads 优化类比健身: 健身教练不会让你天天 bench press, 同样优化也不能每天瞎调。他的节奏: search term audit / keyword 每周 1-2 次; audience 和 bid optimization 每 45-60 天才动一次。原理: 不同维度需要不同样本积累周期, 高频盯短期数据反而会被噪声误导。Amazon 启示: SP 调价不要每天调, 每周看趋势再动手, ASIN target / audience 这种长周期动作 30-45 天看一次足够。
takeaways.quote_en: you need to know what you need to optimize in google every 72 hours every week every month every 90 days and even every year... for some items like search term audits and checking your keywords they need to be checked and optimized once or twice every week versus when you're checking your audiences and your bid optimizations you don't need to check those until every sort of 45 or 60 days
takeaways.tldr: 不同优化动作不同频率:search term 每周 1-2 次,audience/bid 每 45-60 天
bullets: 每周 1-2 次:search term audit、keyword 检查
每 45-60 天:audience、bid optimization
红线:禁止天天调,高频盯短期数据会被噪声误导
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 调价每周看趋势,ASIN target/audience 30-45 天看一次

takeaways.title_zh: Audiences in observation mode + bid adjustment 把 ROAS 从 1.5 拉到 8
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 接手一个 Shopping campaign, 14 天内把 ROAS 从 1.5 提到 8 的关键动作: 在 ad group 加 audiences 但用 observation mode (不是 targeting), 这样不会限缩流量, 只是给 Google 多一个数据维度报表; 14 天后看哪些 audience 转化好, 用正向 bid adjustment 加价。原理: observation 模式下 audience 只是观察口, 不会过早收窄流量, 等数据足够再用 bid 加权才不浪费学习期。Amazon 启示: SD/SP 的 audience targeting 也建议先广撒后用 bid 加权, 不要一上来就排他锁定。
takeaways.quote_en: we added these audiences to the campaign as observations and not actually as targeting... what this allowed us to do is to actually understand which one of these audiences was converting really well and then to be able to put a positive bid adjustment on those audiences
takeaways.tldr: audiences 先用 observation mode 不收窄流量,14天后对高转化受众正向 bid adjustment
bullets: observation mode 不过滤流量,只给 Google 多一个数据维度报表
14天后看转化好的 audience 用正向 bid adjustment 加价
不要一开始就 targeting 锁定,会浪费学习期
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD/SP audience 先广撒后 bid 加权,别上来就排他锁定

takeaways.title_zh: 受众别只锁 niche, 出乎意料的 audience 反而是赢家
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 在某美发产品 Shopping campaign 里加了一堆 audience, 结果转化最好的不是 'hair care enthusiasts' 这类 niche audience, 而是 'luxury shoppers' 和 'family film fans' 这类看起来无关的兴趣群。原理: 用户的实际购买路径常常和品牌假设的不一样, 只锁 niche 会漏掉真实买家画像。Amazon 启示: SD audience targeting 不要只选 'in-market for X' 这种最直接的细分, 应该铺一些跨品类兴趣 audience 用 observation 模式跑数据。
takeaways.quote_en: we don't only just want to add audiences within your niche because you just don't know how some of those other audiences are going to perform... we found that some of the more successful audiences were actually luxury shoppers and family film fans
takeaways.tldr: niche audience 常跑输跨品类兴趣受众,真实买家画像 ≠ 品牌假设
bullets: 美发产品案例:luxury shoppers + family film fans 转化 > hair care enthusiasts
别只锁 niche,跨品类兴趣受众用 observation 模式跑数据
用户实际购买路径常和品牌假设不一致
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD 别只选 in-market for X,铺跨品类兴趣 audience observation 测试

takeaways.title_zh: Audience 报表里 'Other' 占比高 = 你漏加了关键 audience
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 检查 audience 报告必看一行: 'Other'。这一行代表流量来自你没添加的 audience segment。如果 Other 占比超过 10%, 说明你的 audience 覆盖不足, 需要继续添加新 audience 直到 Other 降到 10% 以下、自定义 audience 覆盖率 90%+ 才能做精准 bid 优化。原理: 没数据维度就没法决策, Other 是 Google 在告诉你 '你看不到的部分还很大'。Amazon 启示: SD audience 报表如果有大量未归类流量, 也要主动扩 audience 池来获取可优化粒度。
takeaways.quote_en: the first thing you need to do is to look at this 'other' row... what that means is that there are people who are visiting your website and clicking on your ads who don't fit into any of the audiences that you've added... we want to be aiming for at least over 90 percent of all of our website traffic from our google ads to fit into one of these audiences
takeaways.tldr: Audience 报表 'Other' >10% = 覆盖不足,需添加 audience 直到覆盖 90%+
bullets: 红线:Other 占比 >10% 时无法精准优化 bid
目标:自定义 audience 覆盖率 ≥90%
行动:持续添加新 audience segment 直到 Other 降至 10% 以下
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD audience 报表有大量未归类流量时,主动扩 audience 池获取优化粒度

takeaways.title_zh: Audience bid 调整决策: cost/conv vs 账号均值 + impression share 双重判断
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 决定给某 audience 加 bid 的两道闸门: (1) 该 audience 的 cost/conversion 是否低于账号整体均值 (好于均值才值得加价); (2) search impression share 是否还有上升空间 (已经 100% 就没必要加价烧钱)。两条都满足才上调 bid 10-20%。原理: 单看转化好不够, 必须同时确认还有流量可以拿, 否则只是空烧 CPC。Amazon 启示: SP keyword 调价同理, 高 ROAS + impression share 还低的词才值得加价, 已经 top of search 100% 的不用动。
takeaways.quote_en: we want to look at our search impression share to see if there's any further opportunity to grow the impressions we're getting from this audience as well... if we're already at 100 percent search impression share with this audience there's no point of putting on a positive bid adjustment because we're not going to get any more impressions
takeaways.tldr: audience 加价双闸门:cost/conv 优于账号均值 + impression share 有上升空间
bullets: 加价条件 1:该 audience cost/conv < 账号整体均值
加价条件 2:search impression share < 100%(有余量)
两条同时满足才上调 bid 10-20%,否则空烧 CPC
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP keyword 同理:高 ROAS + impression share 低才加价,已 top of search 100% 不动

takeaways.title_zh: 投放前先把 detailed demographics 和 audience 加上, 喂算法快速冷启动
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 强调一个反直觉做法: 不要等开始投放后再加 audience 和 detailed demographics, 而是 launch 前就在 ad group 里把这些都加上 observation 模式。婴儿奶粉案例: 提前加 'parents of infants/toddlers/preschoolers' demographics, 让 Google 算法第一天就能知道往哪些群体去优化。原理: 算法冷启动期是最缺数据的, 提前给画像信号能加速 learning phase。Amazon 启示: SD/SB 创建时就要把品类相关的 lifestyle / in-market audience 都铺上 observation, 不要等跑了几周再补。
takeaways.quote_en: what most google advertisers don't do but they should be doing is they should be adding their detailed demographics and audiences to their ad groups before they actually start running their campaigns... if you're selling baby formula you would want to add things such as detailed demographic of parents with infants
takeaways.tldr: launch 前就在 ad group 加 detailed demographics + audience(observation 模式),算法第一天就有优化方向
bullets: 红线:等投放后再加 audience → 白白浪费冷启动期数据
正确:创建时铺满相关 demographics/audience,全设 observation
案例:婴儿奶粉提前加 parents of infants/toddlers/preschoolers
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD/SB 创建时就铺品类相关 lifestyle/in-market audience(observation),别等几周后补

takeaways.title_zh: 提升 CTR 直接压低 CPC: Google 只在被点击时赚钱
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 揭穿底层逻辑: Google 只有用户点击 ad 才能赚到钱, 所以高 CTR 的广告对 Google 更值钱, 系统会用更低 CPC 优先展示。反之 CTR 低的广告 Google 会要求更高 CPC 来弥补。所以盯紧 CTR 优化 (改 headline / 加 CTA / 测 emotional hook) 等于在直接降 CPC。原理: 拍卖系统的 quality score 里 expected CTR 是核心权重之一。Amazon 启示: SP/SB 的 CPC 也跟 CTR 挂钩, 提升点击率不光是省广告费, 还能直接拿到更便宜的位置。
takeaways.quote_en: the higher the click-through rate of your ad the lower the cost per click is going to be for that ad and the reason for that is google only gets paid when someone actually clicks on the ad so they want to show ads which actually generate clicks
takeaways.tldr: 高 CTR 广告对 Google 更值钱,系统会给更低 CPC 优先展示
bullets: Google 只在被点击时赚钱,高 CTR = 更低 CPC
CTR 低的广告 Google 要求更高 CPC 弥补
优化 CTR(改 headline/加 CTA/测 hook)= 直接降 CPC
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP/SB 的 CPC 也跟 CTR 挂钩,提升点击率直接拿到更便宜位置

takeaways.title_zh: 高单价/复杂表单类目按 device 加价, 电脑端往往比手机更值钱
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 跑过的复杂表单 / 高客单价产品 (e.g. 保险、B2B) 在电脑端转化率明显高于手机端, 因为人在大屏才愿意填长表单。所以这类产品应在 device 报告里给 computer 加正向 bid adjustment、手机端反而降; 反过来低客单价 / 简单结账产品手机端转化好。原理: 不同设备的用户场景和动机不一样, 一刀切定价是浪费。Amazon 启示: SD 的 device 设置可以用同样思路, 高客单价 ASIN 加权 desktop, 冲动消费类 ASIN 加权 mobile。
takeaways.quote_en: if you're selling a higher priced item or you're requiring a contact form which has more details on it then you may find that you'd actually want to put a positive bid adjustment on computers... whereas if your products are very low priced or you're really only just trying to drive someone to make a phone call you might find that mobiles work for you better
takeaways.tldr: 高单价/复杂表单产品电脑端转化更高,应给 computer 加正向 bid adjustment,手机降
bullets: 加权电脑:保险/B2B等复杂表单或高客单价,大屏才愿填长表单
加权手机:低单价/简单结账/引导电话的产品,手机转化更好
不同设备用户场景和动机不同,一刀切定价是浪费
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD 高客单价 ASIN 加权 desktop,冲动消费类加权 mobile

takeaways.title_zh: 小预算策略: 地理范围收窄到 1-4 个区域, 避免铺得太广
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 反复强调, 小预算 (如每天 $20-30) 最大的错误就是把投放范围设成整个城市。建议只锁定 1-4 个最赚钱的郊区/邮编。同理迁移到 Amazon SP/SD: 低预算时不要勾选 'auto-targeting + 全美', 应集中预算在 1-3 个最匹配的关键词组 (exact / phrase) 或一个高 ROAS 的 ASIN-target, 让有限的展示量都花在最相关的位置上, 而不是被算法稀释到泛流量里。
takeaways.quote_en: if you've got a small budget the worst thing you can do is target the entire city pick one to four suburbs and own them
takeaways.tldr: 小预算($20-30/天)不要铺全城,只锁定1-4个最赚钱的郊区/邮编
bullets: 预算≤$30/天:范围收窄到1-4个区域,避免稀释
砍掉:整个城市/auto-targeting全美这类泛覆盖
集中:最匹配的exact/phrase关键词或单个高ROAS ASIN
takeaways.amazon_tip: 低预算关掉auto+全美,只投1-3个exact/phrase词或单个高ROAS ASIN

takeaways.title_zh: 选搜索量更低、CPC 更便宜的关键词主题, 避开烧钱大词
takeaways.summary_zh: 案例: 水管工小预算客户不要碰 'emergency plumbing' (CPC $15-20, 预算秒烧光), 而是去做 'drainage installation' / 'gas fitting' 这类长尾低 CPC 词, 单价低、转化意图明确、竞争小。Amazon 类比: 新品 / 小预算不要去打 BSR Top 10 大词 (CPC $3+), 而是先打 long-tail exact 关键词或竞品 ASIN-target (CPC $0.5-1), 同样预算能拿到 5-10 倍展示量, 并积累更干净的转化数据喂给 A9。
takeaways.quote_en: don't go after the high volume keyword themes find the lower volume cheaper ones where you can actually win
takeaways.tldr: 小预算避开高 volume 高 CPC 大词,打低 volume 低 CPC 长尾词获 5-10 倍展示量
bullets: 砍掉:泛词高 CPC(如 emergency plumbing $15-20,预算秒烧光)
主攻:长尾低 CPC 词(如 drainage installation/gas fitting,转化意图明确)
预算效率:同预算低 CPC 词拿 5-10 倍展示,积累更干净转化数据
takeaways.amazon_tip: 新品避开 BSR Top 10 大词(CPC $3+),先打 long-tail exact 或竞品 ASIN(CPC $0.5-1)

takeaways.title_zh: Location 选 'Presence' 而非 'Interest', 避免预算外溢
takeaways.summary_zh: Google Ads 默认地理定位是 'Presence or Interest', 即使用户不在你的目标区域, 只要他搜索过相关地点也会触发广告——对小预算是灾难。必须切到 'Presence only', 只投真正在目标区域的人。Amazon 同构问题: Sponsored Display 的 audience targeting 默认会扩展到相似受众, 小预算应关掉 expanded targeting, 确保钱花在精确受众/关键词上。
takeaways.quote_en: switch from presence or interest to presence only otherwise you're paying for tire-kickers who just searched the area
takeaways.tldr: 地理定位必须切 'Presence only',否则预算浪费在搜过地点但不在区域的人
bullets: 默认 'Presence or Interest' 会对搜索过地点但人不在区域的用户展示
小预算必须切到 'Presence only',只投真实在目标区域的人
Amazon SD 同理:关掉 expanded targeting,避免预算外溢到相似受众
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD 关掉 expanded targeting,确保预算只花在精确受众/关键词

takeaways.title_zh: Ad Rank = Max CPC × Quality Score: CTR 高的低出价者反而排名更前
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 用具体数字打脸 'bid 越高越好' 的迷思: 竞争对手出价 $5、CTR 3%、QS 5/10 → Ad Rank 15; 你出价 $2、CTR 12%、QS 9/10 → Ad Rank 18, 你赢且 CPC 更低。Amazon SP 的 Impression Share 逻辑高度类似: A9 优先给 CVR/CTR 高的广告位, 提升 listing 主图 CTR + ASIN CVR 比单纯加 bid 更有效降低 ACOS。
takeaways.quote_en: you can pay two dollars and beat the guy paying five if your click-through rate and quality score are higher ad rank wins not raw bid
takeaways.tldr: Ad Rank = Max CPC × Quality Score,高 CTR 低出价可击败低 CTR 高出价
bullets: $2 出价 + 12% CTR + QS 9/10 → Rank 18 > $5 出价 + 3% CTR + QS 5/10 → Rank 15
赢排名且 CPC 更低的双赢来自 CTR/QS,不是砸钱
红线:别迷信 'bid 越高越好',Ad Rank 才是排序依据
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 提升主图 CTR + ASIN CVR 比单纯加 bid 更降 ACoS

takeaways.title_zh: Quality Score 至少 8/10: 关键词必须同时出现在标题、描述、落地页
takeaways.summary_zh: QS 低于 7 就放弃这个关键词。提升 QS 三要素: (1) 关键词写进 RSA headline 至少 1-2 条; (2) 关键词写进 description; (3) 落地页 H1 + 首屏 copy 含该关键词。Amazon 类比: listing relevance score 同样靠关键词在 title / bullets / A+ / backend 多处一致出现, 不要为了 SEO 堆砌无关词, A9 会扣关联度分。
takeaways.quote_en: aim for eight to ten on quality score the keyword needs to be in your headline in your description and on your landing page all three
takeaways.tldr: QS < 7 直接弃词;QS ≥ 8 要求关键词同时出现在 headline、description、落地页三处
bullets: 弃用红线:QS < 7
headline 至少 1-2 条含该词
落地页 H1 + 首屏 copy 必须含该词
takeaways.amazon_tip: listing 关键词须在 title/bullets/A+ 多处一致,堆砌无关词 A9 扣关联度分

takeaways.title_zh: 前 30-60 天用 broad match 收数据, 再每 3-4 天 audit search terms 升级到 phrase/exact
takeaways.summary_zh: 新账号或新词组前 30-60 天先用 broad (纯 broad, 不是 broad modifier) 让 Google 喂搜索词数据, 每 3-4 天去 Search Terms Report, 高 CVR 的词加进 phrase/exact campaign 加价, 烂词加 negative。Amazon SP 完全可复刻: 自动广告 14-30 天收 search term → 高转化词搬到手动 exact 加价、烂词加 exact negative, 形成 auto → manual exact 双层漏斗。
takeaways.quote_en: run broad for the first thirty to sixty days then every three to four days audit your search terms promote the winners to phrase or exact kill the rest with negatives
takeaways.tldr: 前 30-60 天纯 broad 喂数据,每 3-4 天 audit:高 CVR 升 phrase/exact 加价,烂词加 negative
bullets: 新账号/新词组前 30-60 天只跑纯 broad(非 broad modifier)
每 3-4 天扫 Search Terms Report:高 CVR 词→phrase/exact campaign 加价
烂词立即加 negative,形成 broad 筛选→精准出价双层漏斗
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 自动广告 14-30 天→高转化词搬手动 exact 加价+烂词 exact negative

takeaways.title_zh: 每个 ad group 至少 3 条 RSA: 1 条不 pin + 2 条战略性 pin, 小账号别等 Google 自动测试
takeaways.summary_zh: ETA 在 2022/06/30 退场后, Aaron 强制每个 ad group 上 3 条 RSA: 第 1 条 headline 全开放让 Google 自由组合; 第 2-3 条把品牌词 / 主关键词 pin 到 H1+H2 锁定结构。原因是 Google 'Optimize' 的自动测试要每月 ~5000 impression 才能产出胜出 ad, 小账号根本跑不到, 只能靠人工多版本同时上去抢曝光。Amazon SB 类比: 一个 SB campaign 上 3-4 条 creative variant (不同 headline / lifestyle 主图), 别等 Amazon 自动选优, 主动跑 14 天看 CTR 自己淘汰。
takeaways.quote_en: you need at least three rsas per ad group one with no pinned headlines and two with your brand and main keyword pinned because small accounts never hit the five thousand impressions google needs to finish testing
takeaways.tldr: 每个 ad group 至少 3 条 RSA:1 条全开放 + 2 条 pin 品牌词/主词到 H1+H2
bullets: 小账号月曝光达不到 5000,Google 自动测试永远跑不完
第 1 条 RSA 所有 headline 不 pin,给 Google 自由组合
第 2-3 条把品牌词/主关键词 pin 到 H1+H2 锁定结构
takeaways.amazon_tip: SB 一个 campaign 上 3-4 条 creative variant,跑 14 天看 CTR 自己淘汰

takeaways.title_zh: Phrase / Exact match 现在匹配 '含义' 不是 '词': 必须每周 audit search terms 否则烧钱
takeaways.summary_zh: Google 把 phrase / exact 的匹配逻辑从 '含同样词' 改成 '含同样含义'。例子: 你出 'fluffy earmuffs' phrase, 现在会被 'soft ear warmers' / 'plush headbands' 触发; 出 'lawn care' exact 会触发 'grass maintenance'。后果: 即使你用 exact 也会跑出大量无关词, 必须每周拉 search term report 加 negative。Amazon SP 没有 'meaning match' 这层风险 (exact 还是 exact), 但自动广告的 'close match' / 'loose match' 行为类似 Google broad, 同样要每周 audit。
takeaways.quote_en: phrase and exact now match the meaning not just the words your fluffy earmuffs exact will trigger soft ear warmers if you don't pull negatives weekly google will eat your budget
takeaways.tldr: Phrase/Exact 现已匹配'含义'非'词':每周必拉 search term 加 negative,否则预算失控
bullets: Phrase 'fluffy earmuffs' 会触发 'soft ear warmers'/'plush headbands'
Exact 'lawn care' 会触发 'grass maintenance'
每周必拉 search term report 加 negative,否则 Google 吃预算
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP exact 仍是精确匹配;但自动广告 close/loose match 类似 broad,同样需每周 audit

takeaways.title_zh: Pinning 策略: H1 = 品牌词, H2 = 主关键词, 其他 headline 让 Google 自由组合
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 的 RSA pin 公式: position 1 固定 1-2 条品牌 headline (建立信任 + 防竞品蹭); position 2 固定 2-3 条核心关键词 headline (保证相关性 / QS); position 3 完全开放给 Google 测 USP / promo / CTA。这样既锁定 ad rank 计算需要的关键词信号, 又留出空间让 AI 优化。Amazon SB headline copy 同样可以 '品牌名 + 核心词 + 利益点' 三段式锁定, 但 Amazon 不允许 dynamic insertion, 所以建议直接做 3-5 条静态 SB 跑 A/B。
takeaways.quote_en: pin your brand to position one your main keyword to position two and leave position three completely open that's how you control structure and still let google optimize
takeaways.tldr: H1 pin 品牌词,H2 pin 主关键词,H3 完全开放让 Google 测试
bullets: H1 固定 1-2 条品牌 headline 防竞品+建立信任
H2 固定 2-3 条核心关键词 headline 保证 QS
H3 完全开放测 USP/promo/CTA,给 AI 优化空间
takeaways.amazon_tip: SB 用品牌名+核心词+利益点三段式,做 3-5 条静态跑 A/B

takeaways.title_zh: 5 大优化板块的不同节奏: search term 72h / ad weekly+monthly / QS monthly / bid+audience 90 天
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 的核心反直觉观点: 不同优化项要按 Google AI 学习速度匹配节奏, 频繁改 bid 反而拖累机器学习。完整 cadence: (1) Search terms 每 72 小时 (烧钱最快); (2) Ad copy review 每周 + 月度深度; (3) Quality Score 每月扫一次低分词; (4) Bid / audience / demographics 每 90 天才能动 (AI 需要时间 relearn); (5) Conversion / location / goal 每季度复核。Amazon 同理: SP bid 频繁改会重置 placement 学习, 建议 7 天观察 + 14 天微调; ASIN 主图 / A+ 改完后给 28 天 attribution window。
takeaways.quote_en: search terms every seventy-two hours ads weekly quality score monthly but bids and audiences only every ninety days because google's ai needs time to learn
takeaways.tldr: 5 板块按 AI 学习速度分层调整:search term 72h / ad weekly / QS monthly / bid+audience 90 天
bullets: Search terms 每 72h(烧钱最快需高频)
Ad copy 每周 + 月度深度 review
Quality Score 每月扫低分词
Bid/audience/demographics 每 90 天(频繁改拖累 AI relearn)
Conversion/location/goal 每季度复核
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP bid 频繁改重置 placement 学习,建议 7 天观察 + 14 天微调;主图/A+ 改完给 28 天 attribution window

takeaways.title_zh: Search term audit 在 ad group 级别用 7 天窗口看 ~100 行, keyword audit 用 30 天窗口找 outlier
takeaways.summary_zh: 粒度选择决定信噪比: search term 必须在 ad group 级别拉 (campaign 级别会混入不同主题词), 用 7 天窗口扫 ~100 行(高 cost / 0 conv 的直接 negative); 而 keyword 自身的表现要拉 30 天 (样本太小 CPA 会失真), 重点看高 CPC 或高 cost-per-conversion 的 outlier 决定降价或暂停。Amazon SP search term report 同样建议: auto / broad campaign 用 7 天扫无关 ASIN/ 词加 negative, 关键词 ACoS 表现用 30 天加 placement modifier。
takeaways.quote_en: pull search terms at the ad group level over seven days about a hundred rows but for keywords use thirty days you need a bigger sample for cpa to be reliable
takeaways.tldr: search term 用 7 天 + ad group 级扫 ~100 行,keyword 用 30 天看 outlier
bullets: search term 必须 ad group 级(campaign 级混入不同主题),7 天高 cost/0 conv 直接 negative
keyword 表现拉 30 天(样本小 CPA 失真),重点看高 CPC/高 cost-per-conv outlier 降价或停
窗口差异原因:term 找垃圾词快速排除,keyword 判断真实表现需大样本
takeaways.amazon_tip: auto/broad 用 7 天扫无关 ASIN 加 negative,关键词 ACoS 用 30 天调 placement modifier

takeaways.title_zh: 纪律性 cadence 实战: 6 个月 23 → 135 conv/月 (4.5x), CPC 从 $4.20 → $1.75
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 展示的真实账号: 没有改预算, 没有上新 campaign, 只是按 cadence 表执行 6 个月 — search term audit 每 72h, ad copy 每周, 大改动每 90 天 — 月转化 23 → 135 (4.5x), CPC 从 $4.20 降到 $1.75 (-58%)。结论: 大多数账号不是缺新策略, 是缺纪律和正确节奏。Amazon 同样: 大量卖家每天手动改 bid / 关广告, 反而打乱 placement 学习; 改成固定每周一次的 audit cadence + 90 天战略性调整 ACoS / TACoS 通常能跑赢 '勤奋型' 操盘。
takeaways.quote_en: no new campaigns no new budget just disciplined cadence took this account from twenty-three to one hundred thirty-five conversions and dropped cpc from four twenty to one seventy-five in six months
takeaways.tldr: 6 个月只靠 cadence 纪律(72h audit + 周改 copy + 90 天大调),转化 23→135(4.5x),CPC -58%
bullets: 执行节奏:search term audit 每 72h,ad copy 每周,战略大调整每 90 天
红线:不改预算、不加 campaign,只按表执行
反例:每天手动改 bid/关广告会打乱算法学习,固定 cadence 反而跑赢
takeaways.amazon_tip: 每周一次 audit cadence + 90 天调 ACoS/TACoS,跑赢每天手动改 bid 的勤奋型操盘

takeaways.title_zh: Ad group 必须按 keyword theme 切分: 'men's shoes' / 'women's shoes' / 'kids shoes' 各自独立 copy
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 把一个 'shoes' campaign 拆成 3 个 ad group, 每个 ad group 只放一个主题的关键词 + 该主题的 headline / description。原因: RSA 的 Quality Score 来自关键词与 ad copy 的相关性, 把男鞋 / 女鞋 / 童鞋混进同一个 ad group, copy 必然泛化, QS 全线下滑。Amazon SP 完全适用: 不要把 'yoga mat'+'foam roller'+'resistance band' 放进同一手动 campaign, 应按 product variation / use case 拆 ad group, 每组 keyword 独立, 这样自动出价 / placement 学习更精准, ASIN 关联度也更高。
takeaways.quote_en: you don't want everything crammed into one campaign or one ad group structure them into different keyword themes so the ad copy actually matches what the searcher typed
takeaways.tldr: 按 keyword theme 拆 ad group,每组独立 copy,避免泛化拉低 QS
bullets: 拆分:men's shoes / women's shoes / kids shoes 各自成组
红线:不把不同主题关键词混进同一 ad group
原因:RSA QS 看关键词与 copy 相关性,混放必然泛化
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 按 product variation/use case 拆 ad group,不混 yoga mat+foam roller,出价学习更精准

takeaways.title_zh: 新 campaign 头 30-60 天先用 'Maximize Clicks', 拿到转化数据后才切 'Maximize Conversions'
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 反对新账号一开始就用 conversion-based bidding (Maximize Conversions / tCPA / tROAS): Google 算法需要历史转化样本才能学习, 没数据就上 conversion bidding 会导致曝光骤降 + 成本失控。正确路径: 头 30-60 天用 Manual CPC 或 Maximize Clicks 收集 50+ 转化样本, 再切 Maximize Conversions。Amazon SP 同理: 新 ASIN / 新 campaign 头 14-30 天用 Dynamic bid down only 或 Fixed bid 收集转化数据, 等 ACoS 稳定后再切 'Dynamic bid up and down' 让算法激进出价, 否则 Amazon 算法会把预算烧在 placement 学习上。
takeaways.quote_en: don't start with maximize conversions you need at least thirty to sixty days of data first start with clicks then switch when google has enough conversions to learn from
takeaways.tldr: 新 campaign 头 30-60 天用 Maximize Clicks 收集 50+ 转化,再切 Maximize Conversions
bullets: 红线:新账号禁用 conversion bidding(Maximize Conversions/tCPA/tROAS),算法无历史数据会曝光骤降+成本失控
路径:Manual CPC 或 Maximize Clicks 收集 50+ 转化 → 再切 Maximize Conversions
Amazon:新 ASIN 头 14-30 天用 Dynamic down only/Fixed bid,ACoS 稳定后才切 up and down
takeaways.amazon_tip: 新 campaign 头 14-30 天 Dynamic down only 收集转化,ACoS 稳定后再切 up and down

takeaways.title_zh: Audience segments 设为 'Observation' 不是 'Targeting': 先观察哪个受众转化好再加价
takeaways.summary_zh: Aaron 强烈反对一开始就用 'Targeting' 模式锁死受众 (会大幅压缩流量), 推荐用 'Observation' 模式: 受众层只是观察标签, 不限制谁能看到广告, 跑 30-60 天后看哪个 in-market / affinity 受众 CVR 最高, 再对该层加 bid modifier (+20~+50%)。Amazon SP/SD 类比: 'Audiences' targeting 在 SD 里同样可以先用 broad reach + observation 视角看哪些 lifestyle / interest 受众转化好, 再单独 build 一个 high-bid SD audience campaign 加价收割, 不要一上来就锁死单一 audience segment。
takeaways.quote_en: set audience segments to observation not targeting at the start you don't know yet who's converting let google show you then bid up the winners
takeaways.tldr: Audience 起初用 Observation 模式观察 30-60 天转化数据,再对高 CVR 受众加价 +20~+50%
bullets: 禁止起步就用 Targeting 模式锁死受众(会砍流量)
Observation 模式:受众只做标签,不限制曝光人群
跑 30-60 天后看哪个 in-market/affinity 受众 CVR 最高,再加 bid modifier
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD 用 broad reach + observation 筛出高转化 lifestyle/interest,再单开 high-bid campaign 收割

takeaways.title_zh: Search 广告必须关掉 Display Network + Search Partners, 否则数据被稀释
takeaways.summary_zh: Google Ads 默认勾选 'Search Network partners' 和 'Display Network', 把你的 search budget 推到 AOL / 第三方搜索框 / 横幅展示位, CTR 和 CVR 完全不同, 但数据混在一起报告, 让你误判 search campaign 表现。Aaron 一律取消勾选, 只跑纯 Google search。Amazon 类比: SP campaign 跑搜索结果位 + 商品页位 (placement) 表现差异极大, 必须用 'Top of Search' / 'Product Pages' / 'Rest of Search' 的 placement modifier 单独看 ROAS, 不要看 campaign 总均值; 必要时把 product page placement 单独建 SD campaign 跑。
takeaways.quote_en: always uncheck search partners and display network on a search campaign they dilute your data and the performance is completely different
takeaways.tldr: Search campaign 必关 Display Network + Search Partners,否则 CTR/CVR 混杂无法判断
bullets: 默认勾选会把预算推到 AOL/第三方搜索框/横幅位,表现完全不同
数据混报导致误判 search 效果,一律取消勾选只跑纯 Google search
禁止用 campaign 总均值决策,必须按 placement 拆分看单项 ROAS
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP 用 placement modifier 单看 Top of Search/Product Pages/Rest of Search;商品页位差就拆 SD campaign 跑

takeaways.title_zh: 用 max bid limit 修剪异常高价 click 而非压住整盘出价
takeaways.summary_zh: Smart Bidding 大多数时候比人工好,但偶尔会在个别 auction 出爆炸 CPC(平均 2 块的词被拍到 20 块)。Andrew 的最常用打法是把 max bid 设在 1.2-1.8 倍平均 CPC,只削掉最贵的尖峰,不影响中低价 auction。这与 seasonal bid adjustment 的等比例下调不同——后者会让本来就低的出价掉出 auction、丢量;max bid 只压顶,数据完整,适合表现差时给算法降速但不锁死。
takeaways.quote_en: Paying $20 for a keyword that normally is $2 in average cost per click is just wasteful. The way that I use max bidding limits the most is when I encounter poor performance. I just put a max bid limit. Maybe I put it at 1.5x the average CPC.
takeaways.tldr: max bid 设 1.2-1.8 倍平均 CPC,只削顶部爆炸价,不像等比下调会丢中低价量
bullets: 触发:个别 auction CPC 爆涨(如 2 块词拍到 20 块)
设法:max bid = 1.2-1.8x 平均 CPC,只剪尖峰保留中低价 auction
对比:seasonal adjustment 等比下调会让低价出局丢量,max bid 只压顶不锁死

takeaways.title_zh: max bid 设太狠会触发死亡螺旋,3 个月后利润绝对值反掉
takeaways.summary_zh: 测试在多个国家/campaign 同时压 1x 平均 CPC 的激进 max bid:前 2 个月 click 只掉 15%、利润率涨 15-30% 看起来很美;但 conversion 量掉 33%,被锁出最优质 auction。3 个月后进入下行螺旋,Google 端和后端数据同时变差,即使 ROAS 漂亮,绝对利润也开始下滑。激进压价只能短期(过完 BFCM 时)用,长期必死。
takeaways.quote_en: We lost approximately 15% of clicks which doesn't seem like that much because we saw a 15 to 30% better profit. However, and this is was the key thing, conversions dropped by 33%. What this means is that we're getting locked out of the best auctions.
takeaways.tldr: max bid 压到 1× 平均 CPC,2 个月利润率涨 15-30% 但 conversion 掉 33%,3 个月后绝对利润反掉
bullets: 前兆:click 掉 15%、conversion 掉 33%,锁出优质 auction
拐点:3 个月后 Google 端和后端数据同时恶化,绝对利润下滑
红线:激进压价只适合短期(如 BFCM 后清理),长期必进死亡螺旋

takeaways.title_zh: 拒绝信 Google rep:limited by bid limit 不等于丢 76% auction
takeaways.summary_zh: Google rep 常拿 Smart Bidding 报告里的 limited by bid limit 76% 来劝你松开限制,声称你丢了 76% 的 auction。Andrew 实测多年:max bid 真实含义只是 76% 的 auction 里 Smart Bidding 想出更高价但被你压住,不是被踢出。但 minimum bid limit 才是真正会让你直接掉出 auction 的设置——文档没写,实操中拿掉 min bid 反而流量上涨。结论:听 rep 话之前先看自己后台数据。
takeaways.quote_en: What it means is that in 76% of the auctions that you have been in, smart bidding could have been bidding higher for it. It doesn't mean that you've dropped out of 76% of the auctions you could have been in completely.
takeaways.tldr: limited by bid limit 76% 只是出价被压,不是掉出 auction;min bid 才会踢出
bullets: max bid limit:76% 场次 Smart Bidding 想出更高价但被压,仍在竞价
min bid limit:真正踢出 auction 的设置,拿掉后流量上涨
红线:rep 说法看自己后台数据验证,别直接松限制

takeaways.title_zh: 接手老账户先批量删 negative keywords,5/8 案例后表现反而提升
takeaways.summary_zh: 很多 agency 留下的老账户里堆了大量 negative keywords(尤其是 keyword sculpting / cannibalization 那一套互相排斥的列表)。Andrew 的 Savvy Revenue 过去一年接手的 8 个账户里有 5 个直接清光所有 negative,全部表现优于以往;有家从某 agency 拿过来的客户连续多次复现同一结论,year-over-year 涨 50%。逻辑:keyword 之所以走到 DSA/别的 campaign 是因为 ad rank/quality score 不够,你强行加 negative 等于把它彻底压没。删除时配合略高 budget(+20%) 和 max CPC limits 防止失控,或一周删 10-20% 慢慢释放。
takeaways.quote_en: The amount of accounts that we've taken in the last year maybe five and again we don't take more than eight accounts in a year maybe five five of those eight have all had all negative negative keywords removed and all have outperformed after.
takeaways.tldr: 接手老账户批量删 negative keywords,5/8 案例全部优于原表现
bullets: 删除原因:强行 negative 把 ad rank 不够的词彻底压没,不如让系统重分配
保护措施:+20% budget + max CPC limits 防失控,或分 4-5 周每次删 10-20%
复现案例:某客户连续多次 YoY +50%,agency 留下的 keyword sculpting 列表反而伤害表现

takeaways.title_zh: 看 search term match type 报告,而不是 keyword match type
takeaways.summary_zh: 大部分人看 broad/phrase/exact 表现是按 keyword match type 来汇总,会得出 broad 花了 30-40% 预算 ROAS 还可以的结论。但同样数据切成 search term match type(用户实际搜索词跟你的 keyword 是 exact / close variant / broad 哪种关系)往往会发现 60-80% 的 broad keyword 花费实际命中的还是 exact 搜索词——也就是说就算关掉 broad,你也能拿到同样的搜索量。要判断 broad 到底带没带新增量,必须再下钻到 campaign 级,看哪些 campaign 的 broad ROAS 是 1x 这种级别。
takeaways.quote_en: When you actually look at, okay, if you didn't have broad match you would have hit 90% of the same search terms anyways. In this case, it's performing like we want. Some campaigns the ROAS was like 1x on broad match. So really removing it in those cases made sense.
takeaways.tldr: 看 search term match type 而非 keyword match type:broad 花费 60-80% 实际命中 exact 搜索词,关掉不损失量
bullets: 数据下钻:campaign 级看 broad ROAS,1x 级别的直接砍
判断标准:broad keyword 命中 exact search term 占比 >60% 时关掉无损
红线:汇总层面 broad ROAS 可以 ≠ 每个 campaign broad 都值得留

takeaways.title_zh: 搜索量饱和后再加预算只会推高 CPC,要承认天花板
takeaways.summary_zh: 客户老说要 grow,加预算却只换来 CPC 上涨没新增 conversion——先去看 search impression share 这一列。如果非品牌词都已经 90% 了,意味着真实世界搜你这个东西的人你已经覆盖完了,smart bidding exploration / broad match / AI Max 都救不了你,因为没有新搜索可以挖。这时不是去乱开自动化,而是要承认天花板,告诉客户:要么扩 SKU/品类、要么换渠道(Demand Gen / 站外),或者进入 maintenance 模式降 fee 等下一波增长机会。这是顾问最被低估的能力——如实说话。
takeaways.quote_en: We added the search impression share column. It was 90% search impression share for non-brand search. You have reached all the people searching. There are real people in the real world who are typing things into Google and you're reaching them all. There is no money to spend here.
takeaways.tldr: 非品牌词 impression share 达 90% 就是天花板,加预算只推高 CPC 不增转化
bullets: 判断饱和:非品牌词 search impression share ≥90% 意味着真实搜索已覆盖完
此时禁止:乱开 smart bidding / broad match / P-Max,没新搜索可挖
唯三出路:扩 SKU/品类、换渠道(Demand Gen/站外)、或 maintenance 模式降 fee

takeaways.title_zh: 用 holdout / 地区分组测 brand 词的增量,而不是看 ROAS
takeaways.summary_zh: brand bidding 该不该投不存在通用答案,要看 incrementality:这笔 conversion 不投 brand 词会不会照样发生。最干净的做法是按地理区分两组,一组开 brand 一组关,看后端总 conversion 差多少;次选是停一周开一周交替几次。直接看 brand campaign 的 8x/20x ROAS 没意义——那是用户本来就要找你的钱。也千万不要混 new vs existing customer 那个维度进来,那是另一个问题。
takeaways.quote_en: Instead of asking, should I be bidding for my brand? The better question to ask is, well, is brand bidding incremental for me? Would the conversion have happened anyway? And the only way to actually test this is to do a holdout test.
takeaways.tldr: brand 词看增量不看 ROAS,用地区分组或停开交替测后端总转化差值
bullets: 最优:地理区分组,一组开 brand 一组关,看总 conversion 差
次选:停一周开一周交替数轮
红线:别看 brand campaign 的 8x/20x ROAS,那是用户本来就找你的钱

takeaways.title_zh: brand 词用手动出价更划算,smart bidding 的优势在 brand 上失效
takeaways.summary_zh: Smart bidding 厉害的场景是大量 keyword、转化率波动大、竞争多——brand 词全反过来:几个词、转化率稳定、几乎没竞争。这种场景下 smart bidding 会把 CPC 报到远高于必要值。Andrew 用 experiment 把 brand bid 直接砍 50% 测试,impression / click / revenue 都没掉,直接省一半成本,统计显著。所以大品牌账户上 brand 词省一半 CPC 完全可能,只是大家没去测。例外是 brand shopping campaign,SKU 多+和经销商抢流量,smart bidding 才有意义。
takeaways.quote_en: Big brands can save big bucks on shaving off half their CPCs and have no impact on clicks whatsoever. Smart bidding works great when there's a lot of competitors per keyword. However, for branded keywords, the opposite is the case. You have very few competitors, very stable conversion rates, five keywords, 10, 20 keywords tops.
takeaways.tldr: brand 词竞争少+转化稳,smart bidding 会虚高 CPC;手动砍 50% 不掉量
bullets: brand 词用手动:竞争少、转化稳、词量小,smart bidding 优势全失效
实验结果:brand bid 砍 50%,impression/click/revenue 无损,成本直接减半
例外:brand shopping campaign SKU 多+抢经销商流量,才用 smart bidding

takeaways.title_zh: brand 必须从 PMax 排除,否则 PMax 就是把钱往 brand 词倒
takeaways.summary_zh: 90% 的 DTC 品牌从 Meta 转到 Google 后说 Google 不行,不是 Google 不行,是因为没把 brand term 从 PMax 里排除。一旦月预算到 1-5 万美金,PMax 会把绝大部分预算自动倒进 brand 词,然后看起来 ROAS 很漂亮但其实零增量。规则:有点知名度的品牌一律 exclude;只有刚起步、几乎没人搜你的新品牌可以不管。同时 brand vs non-brand 的 ROAS 报表必须分开,绝对不要合并——合并后没人能为非品牌负责。
takeaways.quote_en: The reason why 90% of DTC brands can't get Google ads to work is because they don't exclude brand terms when they start spending $10,000, $50,000 a month. The majority goes into brand terms in PMAX. If you're an existing brand, for goodness sake, exclude.
takeaways.tldr: 月预算 1-5 万美金以上,PMax 必须排除 brand term,否则预算全倒品牌词零增量
bullets: 有知名度的品牌一律 exclude brand;只有无人搜的新品牌可以不管
brand vs non-brand ROAS 报表必须分开,禁止合并
PMax 不排除 brand 会让 ROAS 虚高但无新客

takeaways.title_zh: shopping feed 用 item_group_id 把变体聚合,不要瞎删 variant
takeaways.summary_zh: 网上很多人说 shopping feed 要砍 variant 简化数据,Andrew 反对:多数情况砍 variant 反而伤覆盖,因为只留一个尺码/颜色的话只要那个 SKU 缺货整个 product 在 Google 就不展示了。基础动作只有一个——给所有同款变体打 item_group_id,Google 自然会聚合数据。只有当一个产品超过 15 个 variant、且 smart bidding 数据被打散到没法分析时,才考虑去重。即便去重也要保留有人搜的差异维度(颜色/材质),并且写好 fallback 规则:首选 variant 缺货时自动切到有货的同组变体,否则会被判 disapproved。
takeaways.quote_en: If you're only advertising for the black size large t-shirt and it goes out of stock even though all other sizes are available then Google will not show anything. The simple thing whenever you work with product variants, this is not rocket science, you add the item group ID to group similar variants together.
takeaways.tldr: shopping feed 默认保留所有 variant + 打 item_group_id 聚合;只有 >15 个变体且 smart bidding 数据打散时才去重
bullets: 砍 variant 红线:只留单 SKU 会导致缺货时整个产品不展示
基础动作:所有同款变体打 item_group_id,Google 自动聚合
去重条件:>15 variant + 数据打散;保留有搜索量维度(颜色/材质) + 写缺货 fallback 规则

takeaways.title_zh: 测试 feed 改动只看 traffic 是否稳,不要纠结 ROAS / impression share
takeaways.summary_zh: 做 feed 层面的改动(去重 variant、改 title、调 attribute)时,大量人盯着 ROAS 和 conversion rate 慌着回滚——这是错的,smart bidding 还没学过来这些指标没意义。Andrew 的判断标准只有一个:traffic 是否稳定。流量没掉就继续,流量明显掉立即回滚。先在 20% 的 SKU 上小范围跑,traffic 没异常再扩到全量。impression share 这种指标在多 SKU 跨产品比对里噪音太大,不要看。
takeaways.quote_en: If you got a big catalog test for goodness sakes test this on 20% of products first. Don't obsess over conversion rates or ROAS during testing because it will not have that big of an impact on smart bidding's algorithms initially. The goal is if traffic stays the same because we can track that really really easily then that's the goal.
takeaways.tldr: feed 改动后只看 traffic 是否稳,ROAS/转化率在算法学习期无意义
bullets: 先 20% SKU 小范围测试,traffic 稳定再扩全量
traffic 没掉就继续,明显掉立即回滚
忽略 ROAS/转化率/impression share,smart bidding 未学习完这些指标噪音大

takeaways.title_zh: 全部塞 PMax 那一套是把 search/shopping 用同一个 ROAS 目标喂
takeaways.summary_zh: Google rep 一直推 consolidate 到一个 PMax 让 AI 分配预算,Andrew 拉数据直接打脸:同一个账户 search 和 shopping 的最优 ROAS 目标本就不同——shopping 通常能撑更高 ROAS,search 给同样目标会被压到只占 5% 预算(健康水位是 20-28%)。这意味着 PMax 一刀切的 ROAS 让 search 永远跑不出量。要 grow 必须拆开:search 用自己的目标和 max CPC,shopping 用自己的;其次 bestseller / 不盈利 / longtail 三档产品也不该共用 ROAS。
takeaways.quote_en: Some accounts run search and shopping where 5% of the spend goes into search where others are at a much more healthy 28%, 20%, 22%. Shopping will routinely be able to produce a higher ROAS than search. So setting the same ROAS target is insufficient for growth.
takeaways.tldr: 同账户 search 和 shopping 最优 ROAS 本就不同,PMax 一刀切让 search 只占 5% 预算(健康值 20-28%)
bullets: shopping 能撑更高 ROAS,search 给同样目标会被压量
拆开跑:search 用独立 ROAS + max CPC,shopping 用独立 ROAS
bestseller / 不盈利 / longtail 三档产品也不该共用 ROAS

takeaways.title_zh: PMax 的 display/video 不是上漏斗流量,而是 retargeting
takeaways.summary_zh: 很多人以为开 PMax 等于自动跑上漏斗 awareness,因为里面包了 display 和 video。Andrew 反对:PMax 的 display 和 video 跟 search/shopping 共用同一个 ROAS 目标,要在那个 ROAS 下达标只能跑 retargeting,push 渠道≠上漏斗。所以指望 PMax 帮你做 awareness 然后回流到 search,逻辑根本不成立。PMax 唯一真正的好处是:聚合数据给 smart bidding 学习 + 让没跑过 DSA 的账户多吃 10-30% 搜索流量。
takeaways.quote_en: This assumption is a very common misunderstanding. So in order to hit the same ROAS target for display as you're doing on search, then you need to do retargeting. So just because we're it's push advertising like display video doesn't mean we're actively targeting people at the top of the funnel.
takeaways.tldr: PMax 的 display/video 共用 search ROAS 目标,只能跑 retargeting,不是上漏斗流量
bullets: 误区:以为 PMax 包 display/video 就等于自动做 awareness
真相:同一 ROAS 目标下 display 只能跑 retargeting 才达标
实际价值:聚合数据喂 smart bidding + 未开 DSA 账户多吃 10-30% 搜索量

takeaways.title_zh: PMax 性能掉了你没工具能修——要预留 standalone 框架
takeaways.summary_zh: PMax 跑得好的时候没人在意黑盒,但常见周期是 3/6/12/18 个月后开始 stagnate 或下滑。这时候 PMax 给你的杠杆只有改预算、改 ROAS 目标、调 asset group 这几个伪动作,没法定位是 brand / category / money keyword 哪一层在垮、是 search 还是 shopping 在掉。standalone search + standalone shopping(每个 bid strategy 至少 300 转化/月)虽然门槛高,但能 (1) 跑 ad/landing page 测试 (2) 给不同 keyword 设不同 ROAS 目标 (3) 出问题时定位修复。所以最好早期就把核心 SKU 拆出来 standalone,别全压 PMax。
takeaways.quote_en: Everything is good until it's not good anymore. And that's really the biggest issue with PMax and consolidating everything. You don't have a lot of options to actually optimize it because you can kind of change the budget, but that doesn't do much. Then you can change the ROAS target up or down. What does that solve?
takeaways.tldr: PMax 3~18 个月后掉量你只能改预算/ROAS,无法定位问题层,要提前拆核心 SKU 到 standalone
bullets: PMax 掉量时只有改预算/ROAS/asset group 三个伪动作,定位不了 brand/category/渠道哪层在垮
standalone search + shopping 能跑测试、分 keyword 设 ROAS、定位修复(门槛≥300 转化/月)
核心 SKU 早期就拆出 standalone,别全压 PMax

takeaways.title_zh: e-com 默认用 target ROAS,不要用 maximize conversion value
takeaways.summary_zh: Maximize Conversion Value 听起来更聪明:给个预算,Google 自由发挥。但 Google 上的搜索量天天波动,这种模式会强迫算法在 demand 低的日子加价烧完预算(CPC 涨 → ROAS 掉),在 demand 高的日子反而不敢加 budget(CPC 被压低 → 错过红利,revenue 被锁顶)。Target ROAS 是反过来:只认每次 click 的合理价格,demand 高就放量,demand 低就少花,ROAS 稳定。结论:e-com 默认 target ROAS,maximize conversion value 只在三种特殊情况用——老板按预算考核、需要花量、或重置账户。
takeaways.quote_en: Telling Google to spend the same thing every day, no matter how much demand there is, makes little sense. On days or weeks with low demand, you'll start seeing smart bidding spend your budget by increasing the CPC. Target ROAS doesn't care if there's a thousand people searching or 10,000 people searching in a day.
takeaways.tldr: e-com 默认 target ROAS;maximize conversion value 只在预算考核/冲量/重置账户三种情况用
bullets: Maximize Conversion Value 缺陷:低 demand 日强行烧预算推高 CPC,高 demand 日不敢加 budget 错过红利
Target ROAS 逻辑:只认单次 click 合理价格,demand 高放量、demand 低少花
红线:日常投放禁用固定预算模式,ROAS 会被 demand 波动拖垮

takeaways.title_zh: 用 portfolio bid strategy 把多 campaign 合并喂数据
takeaways.summary_zh: smart bidding 数据越多反应越快、wasted spend 和 opportunity cost 都更低——但前提是数据合并到同一个 bid strategy 学习。Andrew 的做法是用 Portfolio Bid Strategy(过去叫 Bidding Strategy 现在又改名)把 40 个 search campaign 串到同一个策略里,顺便能拉出 projected ROAS / 实际 ROAS / max CPC / min CPC 几个关键报表来诊断。例如近 7 天 actual ROAS 514 但 projected 只到 571,远低于目标 676 → 立刻知道要调 max CPC 或 seasonal bid adjustment,不是干等。
takeaways.quote_en: We have 40 campaigns all lumped together, which means that we give more data to smart bidding. The key point why more data works better is that smart bidding can then react faster to changes in ROAS, which means less wasted ad spend and less opportunity cost.
takeaways.tldr: Portfolio Bid Strategy 把多 campaign 数据合并喂同一策略,AI 反应更快,浪费和机会成本都降
bullets: 40 个 search campaign 串到同一 portfolio strategy,数据池共享
报表对比 projected vs actual ROAS:差距大立刻调 max CPC/seasonal bid
例:actual 514 vs projected 571(目标 676)→ 马上干预不干等

takeaways.title_zh: 降 ROAS 目标 = 让算法去探索,升 ROAS 目标 = 收紧
takeaways.summary_zh: target ROAS 不是设完就不动,而要在节点上手动调:每次降 ROAS 你是在告诉 smart bidding 去探索新流量、买更多 click;每次升 ROAS 是让它收紧、变高效。即便全年要稳定 ROAS,在大促前/大促刚开始降一档目标,能拿到几天甚至几周的高量低价红利,等算法反应过来调高时已经吃到肉。日常不要频繁动,但 peak / off-peak 转换、conversion 异常、跑量目标变化时一定要主动调。
takeaways.quote_en: Every single time you lower your ROAS target, you're telling smart bidding to go explore, find more volume, buy me more traffic. Decreasing your target ahead of a peak season or right in the beginning of peak season can help you dramatically increase your volume.
takeaways.tldr: 降 ROAS = 算法探索扩量,升 ROAS = 收紧提效;peak 前降一档吃红利
bullets: 大促前/刚开始降 ROAS,抢几天到几周低价高量窗口
日常别频繁动,只在 peak/off-peak 切换、conversion 异常、跑量目标变化时调
升 ROAS 让算法收紧变高效,降 ROAS 让它买更多流量

takeaways.title_zh: brand 词用 manual bid 而非 smart bidding,CPC 能砍到 1/10
takeaways.summary_zh: smart bidding 的设计目标是用 ROAS 内最大化转化量,不是最低成本拿同一笔转化。所以投 brand 词用 smart bidding 等于主动告诉 Google:再多花点也行。Andrew 给两类账户分别跑 manual bid 测试:无外部分销(没有经销商/marketplace 抢流量)的品牌直接砍到 CPC 降 90%、conversion 不变;有外部分销的(经销商/Amazon 在抢)需要更谨慎,但 manual + 实验仍能省 50%。如果 SKU 太多,branded shopping 可以用 smart bidding,但必须配 max CPC 和很高的 ROAS 目标。
takeaways.quote_en: After switching to manual bids, the cost per conversion dropped by 10x. Smart bidding maximizes for volume, not for efficiency. Even with a high ROAS target, smart bidding won't minimize spend if it can get more conversions or more exposure at a lower efficiency.
takeaways.tldr: brand 词用 manual bid,无外部分销时 CPC 能降 90%、转化不变
bullets: smart bidding 目标是量最大化,不是成本最小化,投 brand 词会浪费预算
无经销商/marketplace 竞争时:manual bid 直接降 CPC 90%
有外部分销竞争时:manual + 小流量实验仍可省 50%
SKU 多时 branded shopping 可用 smart bidding,但必须设 max CPC + 极高 ROAS 目标

takeaways.title_zh: 用两个 benchmark 判断 brand 是否过投:>10% spend 或 brand ROAS < 2× 非品牌
takeaways.summary_zh: 怎么知道 brand 词花多了?Andrew 给两个粗暴 benchmark:(1) brand campaign 占总广告预算 >10% 是大红灯;(2) brand ROAS < 非品牌 ROAS 的 2 倍是另一红灯。比如非品牌 ROAS 500%,brand 应该至少 800-1000%,健康水位通常是 8-10x 起,有的行业能到 20-40x。如果你的 brand ROAS 只比非品牌高一点点,要么 brand 出价太狠,要么非品牌太怂。验证方法是用 Google Ads 的 Experiment 功能:50/50 split,把 max CPC 砍一半看 click 是否稳、cost 是否降,稳的话就保留新值,继续往下压。
takeaways.quote_en: If you're spending more than 10% of your overall ad budget on your brand, that's a huge red flag. If your branded ROAS is less than two times of your generic ROAS, then it's another red flag. Normally your ROAS in your brand especially in search want to be at least 8 to 10x and probably 20, 30, 40x.
takeaways.tldr: brand 占总预算 >10% 或 brand ROAS < 2× 非品牌 ROAS 都是红线
bullets: 红线 1:brand campaign 占总预算 >10%
红线 2:brand ROAS < 非品牌 ROAS 的 2 倍
验证:Experiment 功能 50/50 split,砍一半 max CPC 看 click 稳定性

takeaways.title_zh: brand 不要追求第一名:从 99% 掉到 95% 但 CPC 砍半 = 大胜
takeaways.summary_zh: owner 心理上很难接受自己品牌词搜出来不是 #1,但实际算账:top impression share 从 99% 降到 95%、CPC 直接砍 50%、conversion 只丢 5-15%——这是大胜利。'坚持 #1 brand 词'是给 Google 交免费税,真正得利的是看着你出价撑高自己词价的竞争对手。在欧洲还可以走 gentleman's agreement,跟竞品/经销商互相不投对方品牌词;美国不流行但仍可试。
takeaways.quote_en: If you drop from 99% the top impression share to 95% and you save 50% of your CPCs, you might look at it like 'Oh my god, we're not number one.' But if you save 50% of your CPCs and you lose 5%, 10%, 15% of your conversions, that is a win. Over bidding on your name is like giving Google free tax.
takeaways.tldr: brand 词 top impression share 从 99% 降到 95%,CPC 砍 50%、conversion 只丢 5-15% = 大胜
bullets: 放弃 #1 执念:95% impression share vs 99%,CPC 省一半远超 conversion 损失
过度出价 = 给 Google 交税,同时撑高竞品的词价
欧洲可试 gentleman's agreement:互不投对方 brand 词

takeaways.title_zh: smart bidding 时代 negative keyword 是按 search-term 自动压价不是死刑
takeaways.summary_zh: 5 年前 negative keyword 的逻辑是 keyword 级别一刀切,但 smart bidding 已经在 search-term 级别按 device / 价格区间 / 不同 product 单独调价了——同一个搜索词在 desktop 不赚钱可能 mobile 赚,在 $1 CPC 不赚但 $0.25 赚。你提前手动 negate 等于把这个细颗粒度优化的能力锁死。Andrew 的判断:除了明显无关词(竞品名、完全错产品)和 6-12 个月持续表现差的低量词,其余别动,让算法自己降价。新建账户初期或没数据时再加。
takeaways.quote_en: It already acts like a negative keyword system, but with more data and faster action time and more actions than we will have. A search term might lose money at a $1 cost per click, but it will kill it. It will perform excellently at 25 cents. Smart bidding handles that nuance.
takeaways.tldr: smart bidding 已在 search-term×device×CPC 三维自动调价,手动 negate 等于锁死细颗粒度优化
bullets: 只 negate 两类:明显无关词(竞品/错产品)+ 6-12 个月持续差的低量词
同一词在 desktop $1 CPC 亏、mobile $0.25 赚,算法会自动压价而非全砍
新账户/无数据期才主动添加,有数据后让算法自己降价

takeaways.title_zh: 用 click bucket 分箱再加 negative,而不是一刀切 ROAS<200%
takeaways.summary_zh: Andrew 的标准 negative keyword 工作流:把所有 search term 拉出来按 click 数分箱(0-10 / 10-20 / 20-30 / 30-50 / 50+),自己手算 ROAS(不要用 Google 给的聚合 ROAS,均值的均值会骗你)。0-10 click 的低量段不能动——因为里面同时有未来高 ROAS 和低 ROAS 的种子,只要再多一个 click 转化它就跳到高 ROAS bucket。真正能 negate 的只是 20+ click 还低 ROAS 的部分,实操中能砍掉的浪费 spend 通常是 4-8%——别指望靠 negative 大幅省钱,主要价值是清干净不该出的词。
takeaways.quote_en: If I take out these three buckets, meaning everything over 20 clicks, then I find 24,000 in spend that I can remove. That's very little. It's like 3 and a half % of the total spend. We find out that roughly between four to 8% is the actual spend we can remove by adding negative keywords.
takeaways.tldr: 按 click 数分箱(0-10/10-20/20+),只 negate 20+ click 还低 ROAS 的词,实际可省 4-8% spend
bullets: 0-10 click 低量段禁止动,里面混杂未来高/低 ROAS 种子
真正能砍:20+ click 且 ROAS 仍低于目标的词
手算每个 term 的 ROAS,别用 Google 聚合值(均值的均值会骗人)
negative 主要清不该出的词,别指望大幅省预算

takeaways.title_zh: 维护两个 negative 列表:evergreen 和 low-season,大促前清掉 low-season
takeaways.summary_zh: negative keyword 不要堆在一个列表里。分两份:evergreen(永远不想出现的烂词)和 low-season(本季度不行但旺季可能爆)。比如卖泳衣在二月加 negative 的某些词,到 5-7 月旺季会反过来转化,旺季前要主动从 list 里移除。Andrew 还建议:每年至少一次完全清空 negative keyword 让 smart bidding 重新跑 4 周,因为 SKU/品类/价格/竞争都在变,去年烂词今年可能赚——别让 2018 年的 negative 列表把你账户卡死。
takeaways.quote_en: Have two negative keyword lists. Evergreen is the horribly performing. Low season is if you're selling swimsuits and then in February some search terms might not work, but in May, June, July they're going to perform exceptionally well. Put them on a low season negative keyword list that you can remove when you get into your peak season.
takeaways.tldr: negative keyword 分两层:evergreen(永久屏蔽) 和 low-season(旺季前清空)
bullets: evergreen 存永久烂词,low-season 存淡季不行但旺季可能转化的词
旺季前(如泳衣 5-7 月)主动移除 low-season 列表
每年至少一次完全清空 negative 让 smart bidding 重跑 4 周,去年烂词今年可能盈利

takeaways.title_zh: 看 hidden vs visible search term 必须先剔除 brand,否则结论是假的
takeaways.summary_zh: 有篇 viral 文章说 Google 通过 hidden search term 偷广告主钱:visible 5.6x ROAS,hidden 才 2.59x。Andrew 拆原文数据:差距全来自 brand——brand 词天然不涉及隐私所以 100% 可见、ROAS 也高;hidden 那一坨里非品牌占比远高于 visible,把品牌这块差距摊到 hidden 头上,看起来就像 hidden 在亏钱。一旦把数据切成 'non-brand only',visible 和 hidden ROAS 几乎一致。教训:任何按 visible/hidden、search-partner、device 分组的报表都得先拆 brand 和 non-brand,否则品牌的极端 ROAS 会污染所有结论。
takeaways.quote_en: When non-brand, this is where it starts being interesting. There's no difference whatsoever. Branded terms are more visible because there's no privacy issues with that. So we're having a bigger portion of the branded search terms that are visible versus non-brand where there's a bigger portion that are hidden.
takeaways.tldr: 任何按 visible/hidden、device、partner 分组的报表都必须先拆 brand vs non-brand,否则品牌极端 ROAS 污染所有结论
bullets: brand 词 100% 可见 + 天然高 ROAS,会把 hidden 拉低成假象
拆成 non-brand only 后,visible 和 hidden ROAS 几乎一致
红线:不拆 brand 就按 device/partner/可见性分析等于看假数据

takeaways.title_zh: 粒度切太细会饿死 smart bidding,简单结构反而跑得更好
takeaways.summary_zh: DTC 账户最常见错误是把 campaign 拆得太细——按 category、按 brand vs non-brand、按 phrase vs broad,搞出 18+ 个 campaign。这种粒度等于把数据切碎,smart bidding 没有足够样本就学不会:出价不准、RSA 选不出最优 headline、product-keyword 匹配也乱。Andrew 实操偏好的 baseline 结构:bestseller campaign + main campaign + push campaign(给新品/新品类喂量),最多再加一两个迁就客户的特殊 campaign。复杂度迟早会自己长出来——别一开始就搭复杂结构,'感觉略简单'就停手。
takeaways.quote_en: Granularity can kill automation. The more you split up the campaigns, the more you split up the data. The more you split up the data, the longer it takes to use the data. Every setup should have a feeling of being this is a little bit too simple. Not overly simple, but just on the verge of I could tweak this. And that's where you stop.
takeaways.tldr: campaign 拆太细会切碎数据样本,smart bidding 学不会;基线只留 3 个大 campaign
bullets: 致命错误:按品类/品牌/匹配类型拆出 18+ 个 campaign,出价/RSA/匹配全失准
基线结构:bestseller + main + push(新品喂量),最多再加 1-2 个特殊场景
停手标准:'感觉略简单、还能再调'时就停,别提前搞复杂

takeaways.title_zh: 诊断 smart bidding 看 projected ROAS 不看 actual ROAS
takeaways.summary_zh: Smart bidding 出价不是按 actual ROAS 决策的,是按它自己预测的 projected ROAS。所以你看到 actual 68%(目标 661%) 算法却没降价时,别骂它瞎,因为有 conversion lag 它知道还有转化在路上。判断方法:在 bid strategy 报表里 hover ROAS 列,看 projected ROAS。例如 actual 68 但 projected 677、目标 661,说明算法觉得已经达标甚至超标,继续维持出价是对的。CPC 也不是好指标——smart bidding 会在不赚钱的 segment 上把人踢出 auction、在赚钱的 segment 上保持高 CPC,平均 CPC 看不出任何东西。
takeaways.quote_en: Projected ROAS is your core KPI to understand what it's doing. The actual ROAS is what the ROAS is with all the traffic that's come in. But if you hover over it, you can see what is it predicting will come in further. CPC is one of the worst things you can look at when you figure out is my bidding changes working or not.
takeaways.tldr: 算法决策靠 projected ROAS 不靠 actual,actual 低+projected 达标=继续维持出价
bullets: hover ROAS 列看 projected 值,它达标就别动(如 actual 68% projected 677% 目标 661%)
conversion lag 存在时 actual 必然滞后,projected 才是算法真实判断
CPC 不是判断指标:算法会踢掉不赚钱 segment、保持赚钱 segment 高 CPC

takeaways.title_zh: 上限突破靠 off-platform:价格、产品页、AOV 比 broad-vs-PMax 重要
takeaways.summary_zh: PPC specialist 的真正价值不是切 broad/exact,而是看出 off-platform 的瓶颈帮客户提天花板。三个真实案例:(1) 客户改对价格策略,Q1 conversion rate 从 1.32% 涨到 3.34%,profit 直接起飞;(2) 'member price' ROAS 一直差,根因是 product page 没说清如何成为会员、客户不信折扣是真的——改文案就能修;(3) 频繁促销让 AOV 大幅波动,smart bidding 学不会出价节奏,建议直接减促销次数。能跟客户讲清楚这些价值,比讲 'PMax vs standard' 之类账户内话题更值钱。
takeaways.quote_en: Off-platform optimization more or less drove the entire conversion rate increase. We saw that example before where we just got way higher 3x the conversion rate by working on the prices. It doesn't all have to be broad match. It doesn't all have to be a PMax versus standard shopping conversation. This is what clients are looking for.
takeaways.tldr: 价格、产品页、AOV 三个 off-platform 因素比切 broad/PMax 更能突破增长天花板
bullets: 价格策略改对,Q1 conversion rate 从 1.32% 涨到 3.34%
产品页说不清会员机制 → ROAS 差;改文案即可修
促销频繁导致 AOV 波动 → smart bidding 学不会 → 减促销次数

takeaways.title_zh: 拆 campaign 看 conversion 数不看 spend,门槛 300 单/月
takeaways.summary_zh: 看到一份 case study 说月花 5,000 美金就开始拆 top performing categories 进独立 campaign,Andrew 直接打 1/10 分。拆分的判断标准从来不是 ad spend,是 conversion 数。低于 300 单/月就拆,smart bidding 没有足够数据,每个新 campaign 都会 underperform。一个允许的例外:把表现差但吃量的 SKU 从主 campaign 抽出来扔到次级 campaign 限制其 spend,这才叫 segmentation,不是简单按品类切。Amazon 上同理:Sponsored Display/Brand 单独 campaign 之前先看每个 ASIN 的转化体量。
takeaways.quote_en: I like doing segmentation, anybody who follow me know that that's one of the core things is to split up. But not until you get over what I call 300 conversions a month, and these guys had 395 conversions in total. This overall segmentation used in this particular case I will give it a 1 out of 10.
takeaways.tldr: 拆 campaign 门槛是 300 单/月,不是 spend;低于此数 smart bidding 缺数据必 underperform
bullets: 判断标准:≥300 conversion/月才拆,不看 ad spend 绝对值
红线:低于 300 单就拆,每个新 campaign 都会数据不足 underperform
唯一例外:表现差但吃量 SKU 单独隔离限 spend,不是按品类简单切
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD/SB 拆 campaign 前先看单 ASIN 月转化体量是否过 300

takeaways.title_zh: 用 add-to-cart 当 proxy 转化前必须按比例缩 conversion value
takeaways.summary_zh: 高 AOV、低转化体量、长决策周期的产品,可以把 add-to-cart 设为 conversion 给算法喂数据。但绝大多数人忽略一个关键步骤:必须按 ATC→购买的比例倒推缩小 ATC 的 conversion value。如果 5 次 ATC 才有 1 次成交,那 ATC 的 value 应设成实际订单价值的 20%(1/5)。不缩 value,直接拿购物车价当转化值,后期切回 purchase conversion 时所有历史 ROAS baseline 全错,smart bidding 学到的出价策略也是垃圾。Amazon 站内拿不到 ATC 信号,但思路通用——任何代理转化都要按转化漏斗比例缩 value。
takeaways.quote_en: What you want to do is you want to try to calculate what is the relationship from add to cart to purchase. So if it takes five add to carts to result in one conversion or one purchase, then you want to reduce the value of the add to cart conversion by 5x, meaning 20% of what an actual add to cart value is.
takeaways.tldr: ATC 当转化必须按漏斗比例缩 value:5 次 ATC→1 次购买,ATC value 设为订单价 20%
bullets: 计算 ATC→purchase 比例(如 5:1),ATC value 缩为订单价的 1/5
不缩 value 直接用购物车价,后期切 purchase 时历史 ROAS 全错
代理转化的 value 必须反映真实漏斗转化率,否则 smart bidding 学偏
takeaways.amazon_tip: 站内无 ATC 信号,但任何代理转化(如详情页停留)都要按漏斗比例缩 value

takeaways.title_zh: 判定 case study 真假先验 platform ROAS 与总 revenue 的相关性
takeaways.summary_zh: 看别人晒的增长 case 时,Andrew 的第一道筛子是查 platform 内 ROAS 与总营收的相关性。一份案例显示 Google Ads ROAS 从 5x 跳到 10x 但同期 blended revenue 没动,另一段 ROAS 翻倍而 blended 反而走平,这种背离说明数字编了或漏掉了其他渠道变化没说。真增长的特征:platform ROAS 和 blended 同方向同幅度变动。Amazon 投放复盘也一样——Sponsored ads 报表里的 sales 涨了,但店铺总销售没涨,要么是 cannibalization 自然单,要么是数据错位,绝不是真正的增量。
takeaways.quote_en: In order to verify that, you need to make sure that the relationship between Google Ads revenue and the total revenue is there. In this case, we're seeing that the ROAS in Google Ads is one and then it's 18 and here is 40 and here's 50. Then in October, Google Ads ROAS goes down to 5x. Blended is up at 50. There's no correlation.
takeaways.tldr: platform ROAS 与 blended revenue 必须同向同幅变动,背离即造假或漏说其他渠道
bullets: 假案例特征:Google ROAS 5x→10x 但 blended revenue 不动
真增长特征:platform ROAS 和 blended 同方向同幅度变动
背离原因:数字编造 或 隐瞒其他渠道变化
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP sales 涨但店铺总销售不涨 = cannibalization 自然单或数据错位,非真增量

takeaways.title_zh: PMax→Standard 切换前必看 channel breakdown 和 100 单门槛
takeaways.summary_zh: 从 PMax 切回 Standard Shopping 之前先做三个检查:(1) 拉 channel breakdown,看 conversion 来自 shopping 还是 search/YouTube/display——如果 shopping 干了大头,放心切;如果 search 占比高,得单独建 search 或 DSA campaign 接住;(2) 月转化低于 100 单不要切,smart bidding 没数据训练,切完只会更糟;(3) 想切的真实理由必须是'shopping 表现好但 PMax 不愿意 scale 这个 channel',不是凭感觉。Amazon 同理:看 Sponsored Brands vs Display vs SP 的 attribution 占比再决定要不要拆 campaign。
takeaways.quote_en: If shopping is doing all the heavy lifting, then you're probably fine to switch. You're not probably fine, you're definitely fine to switch. If you're getting fewer than 100 conversions per month inside of PMAX, be careful. If you're under 30, you're basically flying blind trying to make the switch.
takeaways.tldr: PMax 切 Standard 前查 channel breakdown,Shopping 占大头才切;月转化 <100 单禁切
bullets: 查 conversion 来源:Shopping 占大头放心切,Search 高要单独建 Search/DSA 接住
月转化 <100 单禁切(smart bidding 无数据),<30 单等于盲飞
切换理由必须是'Shopping 表现好但 PMax 不愿 scale 该 channel',非凭感觉
takeaways.amazon_tip: 看 SB/Display/SP attribution 占比再决定拆 campaign

takeaways.title_zh: 切到 standard shopping 前先排除品牌词解锁真实非品牌 ROAS
takeaways.summary_zh: PMax 里混着品牌词的 ROAS 是假象——总账漂亮的 400% ROAS 拆开看可能 brand 是 900%、非品牌只有 300%。直接照抄 PMax 的 ROAS 目标到 standard shopping 必死。正确做法:先在 PMax 里 exclude brand 跑一段,brand 流量自然落进新建的 brand standard shopping 和 brand search,这时 PMax 的 ROAS 会从 400 掉到 300,这个 300 才是非品牌真实水平,拿它当新 standard shopping 的目标。Amazon 上同理:Sponsored Brand 把品牌词单拎出来,Sponsored Display 看 non-brand 的真实 ROAS。
takeaways.quote_en: By excluding the brand we now get a clearer idea of what is our PMax actual ROAS. So when we're setting up standard shopping now, we know okay, standard shopping shouldn't be at 400% ROAS target, it should be at 300%. By this part, we actually know exactly how much our non-brand shopping is supposed to be from a ROAS perspective.
takeaways.tldr: PMax 里 brand 词会虚高 ROAS;先 exclude brand 跑出真实非品牌 ROAS(如从 400% 掉到 300%)再设 standard shopping 目标
bullets: 混合 ROAS 是假象:brand 900% + 非品牌 300% = 总账 400%
操作:PMax exclude brand → brand 流量落进 brand standard shopping + brand search
PMax 掉到的新 ROAS(如 300%)才是非品牌真实水平,用它设新 standard shopping 目标
takeaways.amazon_tip: SB 单拎品牌词,SD 看 non-brand 真实 ROAS

takeaways.title_zh: PMax→Standard 平滑切换:逐步抬 PMax ROAS 把量挤过来
takeaways.summary_zh: 首选打法是 gradual overlap:新 standard shopping 建好后两个 campaign 平行跑 1-2 周。这时 PMax 因为有数据优势会吃掉 90% 流量,standard shopping 只有 10%,正常。强行换不靠改预算,靠每周抬 PMax 的 ROAS 目标:第一周双方都 500,然后 PMax 涨到 550、600、700,standard shopping 不动,流量自然往 standard 跑。一到 50/50 就立刻 100% 砍掉 PMax,不要因为'看起来还行'多跑——双 campaign 长跑会割裂数据让两个都变差。Amazon 上 SP→SD 切换/auto→manual 切换思路一样:别一刀切,用预算/出价梯度做平滑迁移。
takeaways.quote_en: Option A is the gradual campaign overlap, and this is my personal go-to. The best way to do this is by increasing the ROAS target on PMax. So in week one we have a 500% ROAS target on both campaigns. Then PMax goes up to 550, then the following week 600, then 700. Once you're at the 50/50 mark, switch over to standard shopping. Do not attempt fate by letting this run for much longer.
takeaways.tldr: PMax 和 Standard Shopping 平行跑 1-2 周,每周抬 PMax ROAS 目标(500→550→600→700)挤量,到 50/50 立刻砍 PMax
bullets: Standard Shopping 保持 500% ROAS 不动,只调 PMax
初期 PMax 吃 90% 流量正常,靠 ROAS 梯度自然转移
到 50/50 立刻砍 PMax,长跑双 campaign 割裂数据让两个都变差
takeaways.amazon_tip: SP→SD 或 auto→manual 切换同理:用预算/出价梯度平滑迁移,别一刀切

takeaways.title_zh: branded campaign 是品牌防御不是 funnel 阶段,别叫 prospecting
takeaways.summary_zh: 把账户结构命名为 branded search / prospecting search 听起来对称,但底层逻辑错了。branded 不是 funnel 的某一层(top/mid/bottom),它是品牌防御位——你必须在,因为竞争对手会买你的词。它不参与拉新转化漏斗,也不是 mid/bottom funnel keyword(除非你像 Nike 那样品牌词流量已经成了大众类目搜索)。把 brand 和 prospecting 并列报表会污染你看 non-brand ROAS 的判断。Amazon 上同理:Sponsored Brand 投自己品牌词主要是防御 ASIN 抢位,不该跟 Sponsored Display 拉新混在一起算 ROAS。
takeaways.quote_en: Saying you have a campaign that's called prospecting and then you have prospecting search indicates to me that you're looking at branded search as something that is a part of your funnel when it's not. It's just you have to be there. You have to defend the position. It's just a brand defense. So that completely misunderstands the funnel.
takeaways.tldr: branded campaign 是防御位(必须在),不是 funnel 某一层,别与 prospecting 并列算 ROAS
bullets: branded ≠ funnel 阶段(top/mid/bottom),它是竞品抢位防御
与 prospecting 并列报表会污染 non-brand ROAS 判断
除非品牌词=类目词(如 Nike)级别,否则不参与拉新转化漏斗
takeaways.amazon_tip: Sponsored Brand 投自有品牌词是防 ASIN 抢位,别跟 SD 拉新混算 ROAS

takeaways.title_zh: branded shopping 出现非品牌词,根因是 campaign 优先级设错不是缺 script
takeaways.summary_zh: 很多 in-house 跑脚本往 branded shopping campaign 里塞非品牌 negative,这是治标。真原因要么是 brand campaign 出价太高,要么是 brand campaign 里的 SKU 没同时出现在 non-brand campaign 里——这时 priority 设置失效,brand 反而吃了非品牌流量。Andrew 跑千万级账户从不用脚本,只调 priority 和确保产品在 non-brand 里都有。一个例外:PMax + standard shopping 同时存在时,优先级会被 PMax 打乱,这时也别加 negative,改架构。Amazon SD 投 ASIN-defense 时同理:看 placement 报表别看到 non-brand 流量就乱加 negative ASIN,先查投放结构。
takeaways.quote_en: When non-branded terms appear in your branded shopping, it's typically because of one or two reasons. Either your bids are way too high in your branded campaigns, or B, the products in your branded campaigns aren't in the non-branded campaigns. We run multi-million dollar campaigns without them. Using the script is just playing whack-a-mole.
takeaways.tldr: branded shopping 吃非品牌流量根因:出价过高或 SKU 未同时进 non-brand,调 priority 不加 negative
bullets: 根因二选一:brand campaign 出价太高 / SKU 未同时出现在 non-brand 里
解法:调 priority + 确保 SKU 双线覆盖,不跑脚本加 negative
PMax + standard shopping 共存时优先级失效,改架构不加 negative
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD 投 ASIN-defense 看到 non-brand placement 先查架构,别直接加 negative ASIN

takeaways.title_zh: category-based campaign segmentation 是错的,只有季节品类才拆
takeaways.summary_zh: 把 shopping 按 category 拆成 tops vs bottoms 这种 arbitrary split 没有任何性能差异——搜的人不分,不同 category 的 conversion rate 也没差。这种拆法只会减少 smart bidding 的数据量。唯一合理的 category 拆分:有明显季节区分的 apparel(冬季 coat vs 夏季 short),且确实季节切换时整组商品停跑。其他场景一律不拆 category。同样,margin-based segmentation 也是错的,因为 click 不等于购买,改用 profit-based bidding(把 conversion value 换成 gross profit)。Amazon 上 SD/SB 按品类拆 campaign 也要克制——除非品类间转化漏斗真的不同。
takeaways.quote_en: Product category segmentation, particularly effective for what? I have never in my life seen that work. So this in my opinion is a huge mistake. You should avoid any of these arbitrary category splits like a top versus a bottom. There's no performance difference whatsoever between the two. It just reduces the data volume for smart bidding to do.
takeaways.tldr: 按品类拆 campaign(tops vs bottoms)无性能差异,只减少数据量;仅季节品类例外
bullets: 错误做法:任意品类拆分(tops vs bottoms),搜索/转化率无差异
唯一例外:季节品类(冬季 coat vs 夏季 short)且季节切换时整组停跑
margin-based 拆分也错,改用 profit-based bidding(conversion value 换 gross profit)
takeaways.amazon_tip: SD/SB 按品类拆 campaign 需克制,除非转化漏斗真的不同

takeaways.title_zh: margin-based campaign 失效是因为点击不等于购买
takeaways.summary_zh: 把 shopping/PMax 按 margin 拆成高/中/低三档 ROAS 目标(300/500/700%) 听起来很对,实际三处全错:(1) 至少 30-50% 消费者最终买的不是他们点的那个 ASIN/category——bidding 是按点击出价的,可购买行为对不上;(2) Google 的 conversion 报表只追溯到点击的 product id 不是真正卖出的 product id,自己看了个假象;(3) 数据被切到三个 campaign,low margin 那条只剩 150 单/月,smart bidding 直接学不会。结论:不要按 margin 拆 campaign。Amazon 上同样:不要按 ACoS target 把同类目 SKU 拆到不同 campaign,会饿死数据。
takeaways.quote_en: It assumes the consumers buy what they click on, which isn't the case. I've done this analysis in many, many accounts and every single time I review it, at least 30 to 50% of consumers buy a completely different brand or completely different category than the product that they clicked on.
takeaways.tldr: 30-50% 消费者最终买的品类/品牌与点击不同,按 margin 拆 campaign 三重失效
bullets: bidding 按点击出价,但 30-50% 购买与点击对不上
Google conversion 报表追溯到点击 product id 而非真实卖出 id
数据被切散(如 low margin campaign 只剩 150 单/月),smart bidding 学不会
红线:不按 margin/ACoS target 拆分同类目 SKU 到不同 campaign
takeaways.amazon_tip: 不按 ACoS target 把同类目 SKU 拆到不同 campaign,会饿死数据

takeaways.title_zh: 用 gross profit 替代 revenue 做 conversion value 是 margin 问题正解
takeaways.summary_zh: 想区分高低 margin 产品,正解不是拆 campaign,是把上传给 Google 的 conversion value 从 revenue 换成 gross profit(= revenue - 折扣 - COGS - 运费 - 支付费 - 包装)。每笔订单的真实利润直接喂给 smart bidding,算法自动对高 margin 产品/词/audience 加价、对低 margin 减价,数据完全保留在一个 campaign 里。注意:促销期 conversion value 会突变(100 跌到 70),smart bidding 会迷惑;低 margin 业务(POAS 120% 那种)profit-based 数据噪音太大也不适合。Amazon 站内拿不到 cogs 喂回去,但思路通用:做内部 PoAS 报表辅助决策,别只看 ACoS。
takeaways.quote_en: What we're trying to do is we're trying to track the gross profit from a sale instead of revenue, which means that you bypass the need to run margin based campaigns. Each transaction tells Google exactly what margin or contribution margin or gross profit that's derived from that transaction.
takeaways.tldr: conversion value 喂 gross profit 替代 revenue,算法自动对高 margin 产品/词/受众加价
bullets: gross profit = revenue - 折扣 - COGS - 运费 - 支付费 - 包装
促销期 value 突变(100→70)会让 smart bidding 迷惑
低 margin 业务(POAS 120%)profit 数据噪音大不适用
takeaways.amazon_tip: 站内拿不到 COGS 回传,做内部 POAS 报表辅助决策别只看 ACoS

takeaways.title_zh: 每次改 bid/budget 必在 graph 上打 note,3 秒省未来几小时复盘
takeaways.summary_zh: Andrew 15 年最大习惯之一:任何 bidding/budget/暂停/大改都要在 Google Ads graph 里加一条 3 秒的小注释,同时把决策思路存到 Notion 数据库。日后看到某天 spend 断崖、ROAS 异常就能秒查到原因,而不是凭记忆瞎猜。Amazon SP/SB/SD 同理——后台没有 graph annotation,但可以在飞书表格 / Notion 里建 change log,每次改 bid、target ACoS、加 negative、暂停 ASIN 都记一行。复盘和向老板解释波动时这就是救命数据。
takeaways.quote_en: When you make a bidding change, when you make a budget change, when you make a bigger change to campaigns, new pausing, a lot of stuff, just put in a small note. It takes you 3 seconds to do. And you can then in the future see, hey, we saw lower spend on this day or after this day, what happened?
takeaways.tldr: 每次改 bid/budget/暂停时在 graph 打 3 秒 note + 同步 Notion,复盘秒查原因省几小时
bullets: 触发条件:改 bid、budget、暂停、大改 campaign 都必记
双记录:Google Ads graph annotation + Notion 决策思路
价值:异常 spend/ROAS 秒溯因,不靠记忆瞎猜
takeaways.amazon_tip: 飞书表格建 change log,记 bid/ACoS/negative/暂停 ASIN,向老板解释波动时救命

takeaways.title_zh: 主动周报 30 分钟换走 80% 临时打断
takeaways.summary_zh: in-house 投手最大问题是被动响应——老板/品类经理/品牌部随时插队问数据。Andrew 解法:每周固定花 30 分钟(或 10 分钟 Loom)主动发一封周报,覆盖正在跑的 sale、push 的产品、两周前定的事进展、关键指标变化。看似多花 30 分钟,实际把全周零碎打断削掉 80%。Amazon 投手对接老板/电商运营/品牌方时同理:周一固定时间发周报压住所有'你看到 ACoS 涨了吗'的随机骚扰,把自己的 deep work 时段保护下来。
takeaways.quote_en: Proactive communication lower all other communication tasks by 80%. Just making sure that you every week you send a report or an update out to your manager. Take those 30 minutes and give them an update on everything. It stops people from asking you a thousand questions randomly throughout the week.
takeaways.tldr: 每周固定 30 分钟主动周报,削掉 80% 随机打断
bullets: 周报覆盖:在跑 sale、push 产品、两周前定事项进展、关键指标变化
看似多花 30 分钟,实际保护全周 deep work 时段
压住老板/跨部门'ACoS 涨了吗'式随机骚扰
takeaways.amazon_tip: 周一固定时间发周报给老板/运营/品牌方,阻断随机数据索取

takeaways.title_zh: feed/listing 拆成 hygiene + optimization 两阶段,90% 工作量是首次 buildout
takeaways.summary_zh: Andrew 10 年管 Google Shopping feed 的核心方法:把 feed 优化拆成两个独立任务。第一阶段 hygiene 是 pass/fail 黑白题——GTIN/brand/availability/condition 是否填对、是否齐全,一次做完几乎不再碰;第二阶段 optimization 才是 title/image/product type/custom label 这些有判断的活。多数人卡死是因为把两件事混在一起做就崩了。Amazon 上 SP/SB 投放对应的是 listing buildout(GTIN/UPC、品牌、属性是否齐全) vs listing optimization(title 关键词、A+、Main Image),先把 hygiene 100% 补齐再投预算优化转化,不要一上来就调 bid。
takeaways.quote_en: The key isn't to try to optimize everything. It is to split the work into two distinct jobs. One is the feed hygiene and the other one is what I call the true feed optimization.
